bullets: Flavor Profile: Made with the finest black tea leaves, rose buds and rose petals, this tea steeps a subtle and floral cup and provides a very calming experience.

Full-Leaf Black Tea: Unlock the power of full-leaf black tea! Full-leaf teas retain more essential oils which release rich wonderful flavors when infused. Loose leaf black tea gives you the opportunity to appreciate the tea leaves every time you steep a pot of delicious black tea.
Steeping Instructions: Steeping black tea is easy. Simply heat fresh, filtered water to a rolling boil. Then pour 6 oz water over tea and steep for 3-5 minutes.

bullets: DELICIOUS EXPERIENCE – This Art of Tea Bulk pack includes 50 pyramid tea sachets of our all-new Rose Black Tea. a silky, full body blend of rich black tea with hints of freshly blossomed rose petals that offer a refreshingly complex flavor that will leave you calm and relaxed. Our carefully hand selected rose tea leaves are picked fresh and are made up of the most amazing edible rose petals for desserts we could find. This rose petal tea is just like afternoon tea at your favorite Rose Gardens.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED - Each Art of Tea signature sachet comes individually wrapped in our signature plant-based PLA (polylactic acid), derived from renewable plant sources, pyramid tea bag sachet ready to be steeped into a perfect cup of tea. Wrapping each individual sachet allows us to ensure each bag is fresh, full of flavor, and ready to be enjoyed. Take some on the road with you or enjoy our Art of Tea signature tea box designs, perfect for an artful contribution to your kitchen counters.

CREATE A PERFECT BREW - Each tea pack includes 50 individual tea sachets, enough for 50 strong cups of delicious tea! Each sachet is blended for one 8 oz cup of tea, for this Rose Black Tea Blend, steep water to 206 degrees Fahrenheit and steep for 3-5 minutes. If you’re looking to brew a bigger batch, add one tea bag per 8 ounces of water for a strong brew in larger doses.
CAFFEINE CONTENTS - This Rose Black Tea blend contains a moderate amount of caffeine, making this a perfect tea to start your day with. Goes great with breakfast.
ADDITIVE FREE - All of Art of Tea’s blends are 100% organic or made of natural ingredients with no additives. This Rose Black tea includes: Black Tea, Organic Rose Petals, Natural Flavor

I heard of it from someone on YouTube as the ~most authentic~ brand of Thai tea for restaurants. She said that in the US, restaurants typically use…I think it was half and half, sugar, and vanilla, and in Thailand, restaurants use evaporated milk, sweetened condensed milk, and vanilla. I did oat milk, vanilla, and sweetened condensed milk and it tasted like the boba shops in my area so I was satisfied! My general thought with any drink dupe you are making at home is that if it doesn’t taste right, you don’t have enough sweetener. I found that to be the case here too. bullets: JUST ADD WATER & ENJOY: Number One red rose oolong tea combine premium oolong tea powder and rose to bring you soothing, aromatic tea. It's so easy to make - just add water, steep, drain and enjoy!

MAKE YOUR FAVE BEVERAGES HOT OR COLD: From your hot breakfast tea, irresistible iced milk tea, yummy boba/bubble tea to that smoothie with a refreshing floral twist, this rose oolong tea lets you easily recreate/invent your very own delicious beverages.
USE AS A BAKING OR DESSERT INGREDIENT: Number One oolong and rose tea is delightfully versatile. Include it in a cake mix, ice cream flavoring, cookie, pancake or waffle base - how cool is that?
WELL-LOVED TEA BRAND FOR OVER 70 YEARS: Number One oolong and rose tea comes from one of Thailand's most loved tea brands, so you can be assured of its premium quality.
SPECIFICATIONS OF NUMBER ONE ROSE OOLONG TEA: 5.3oz in a resealable bag for easy storage

important_information.Safety Information: Contains high levels of caffeine. Not recommended for children or pregnant women. Steeping for too long may make the tea bitter.
important_information.Directions: 1. Add boiling water to one tablespoon of Number One rose oolong tea, steep for 2-3 minutes and drain for hot tea. 2. Add unsweetened milk, coconut milk or half-and-half to the batch of ice tea for Thai milk tea. 3. Add chewy tapioca pearls to Thai milk tea for boba tea. 4. Incorporate Number One rose oolong tea into cake mix, ice cream, baked goodies, or smoothies for not just making beverages only.

✅MULTI-PURPOSE – Apart from blending drinks, Number One Original Thai Tea Mix (Red-Label) can be used as an ingredient to add original Thai tea flavor for bakery and dessert such as cake and egg custard. Fulfill your imagination and creativity in food industry with our multi-purpose tea mix.

✅YOUR TEAROOM, AT EASE – Everyone can be a tea artisan with Number One Original Thai Tea Mix (Red-Label). Sip the rich and smooth taste and feel the unique aroma of your authentic Thai tea effortlessly in just minutes with our products in sachets. (4g x 50 sachets) Enjoy the ultimate taste, worry-free with zero calories.

💝PERFECT GIFTS – Number One Original Thai Tea Mix (Red-Label) is the best gift for your beloved people, friends and family members on special occasions. With our high-quality products and unique taste and aroma, Number One Original Thai Tea Mix will surely bring joy and happiness to everyone you love.

✅INSTRUCTIONS – pour 1 sachets of Original Thai Tea Mix (Red-Label) in your favorite cup. Pour 300 ml. of hot water, soak it for 3-5 minutes. Use a spoon to press the sachet to get more concentrated tea. Then remove the tea mix sachet, and season as you wish with sugar, lemon juice, condensed milk, fresh milk or non-dairy creamer to create a variety of drinks menu. Also, you can add some ice or chill to make cold drinks, or enjoy it immediately as hot drinks.

Enjoy 5 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Terry Chance 4.0 out of 5 stars  Not restaurant Thai tea but not bad either… Reviewed in the United States on June 28, 2021 Size: 12 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I never know how to rate this kind of product. Do you rate it against another instant tea or against the best you have ever had in a restaurant or even homemade? I have had Thai tea in a few different restaurants and have brewed some at home. This tea in no way stands up to those. It simply doesn’t have the depth of flavor of brewed Thai tea. However, it gives a pretty good account of itself and definitely tastes like Thai tea. It’s not like you drink it and think, what is this. My wife loves it but hasn’t has any brewed Thai tea in a restaurant. As far as strength, the directions call for only 7oz of water per packet. You can’t dump this into a large glass or coffee mug and get much taste. So a 14oz coffee mug would take two packets and maybe slightly less water if you really want deeper flavor. It actually has sugar and is fairly sweet. I sometimes use the small styrofoam 8oz cups and fill it to about 1/4” from the top and it comes out great. So, I am going to it give it 4 stars. It is not restaurant quality but is a good quick fix. If I had never had restaurant Thai tea, like my wife, I would have thought this is great but it has to be made according to the directions. Also, I originally bought this at a Korean store on a whim. I figured that it couldn’t be that good but what the heck. I was pleasantly surprised that it didn’t had an artificial sweetener taste. The store is an hour and a half away so I checked Amazon and there it was. I have ordered it a couple of times so far and will probably continue to do so. It’s more than just a drink—it’s a cultural experience in a cup. 23 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Maya 4.0 out of 5 stars  pretty good, not the absolute best Reviewed in the United States on April 26, 2025 Size: 2.82 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase pretty good for the cost, but not really higher-end quality. i like the taste but i usually add some monk fruit extract as a sweetener because the tea is a teeny bit bitter and the sweetness of the monk fruit makes it more enjoyable. there are bits of tea dust left in my cup when i pour it into my cup from my teapot, but not a crazy amount. doesn’t smell amazing compared to some higher-quality teas i’ve tried, but doesn’t smell off-putting. i’d say buy it if you’re new to drinking loose leaf tea, not too picky, or want a daily tea that won’t break the bank 18 people found this helpful Helpful Report  avgvstvs 5.0 out of 5 stars  Earthy and Heartwarming Reviewed in the United States on July 12, 2020 Size: 2.82 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I'm still very young in my tea journey, so please don't expect the review of a connoisseur. Most teas green or otherwise that I've tried recommend 1 instead of 2 teaspoons of dry tea to 7oz of water, I followed the package directions which just suggested 2 teaspoons, and my hot water device is limited to 8oz. Steeped at 75C. The smell is unlike other green teas I've had, as far as loose leaf, the only other green tea I've tried is Vahdam's Himalayan Green. This tea has a much stronger flavor than Vahdam. When it hits my tongue I'd say the first flavor that I get is more of an earthy "mushroom" flavor, with a mild tea flavor in the background that fades into a little astringency and tea bitterness. (3min might be to long for a first steep.) There's definitely a plantlike flavor that cuts across the middle, but I definitely wouldn't call this "grassy." I would say there's a definite hint of "seaweed" in the mix. It reminds me of some of the teas I've had in Good sushi restaraunts, though my strainer is clearly not good enough as my brew looks more cloudy than what's represented in some of the pictures I've seen of this tea. The particles are light enough NOT to settle during the drinking of a single cup, it doesn't bother me at all. A second steep at 2min this time provides a flavorful green tea, less pronounced on the earthy/astringent/seaweed notes I described in the first steep (done for 3min). I wish this were a little less expensive, this is probably one of my favorite green teas I've tried, and while I still admit that I'm new to loose leaf, there's something about Japanese green teas overall that has a character unlike any other geographical region I've tried. This would definitely be a daily staple, this is something that on a cold rainy day I'd want to brew and sit down with a nice bowl of miso by a fire. Genuinely a great tea. bullets: ORGANIC SENCHA GREEN TEA – Certified 100% organic by JONA and JAS, our premium organic Japanese green tea loose leaf is grown in the heart of Uji, Kyoto – a region globally recognized for its superior Japanese tea production. Handpicked from a tea plantation with a 350-year legacy, our organic sencha green tea captures centuries of Japanese craftsmanship. Enjoy an authentic experience with one of the finest loose leaf teas that Japan has to offer, completely free from additives and grown without genetically modified ingredients.

SENCHA LOOSE LEAF TEA – JAPAN’S MOST POPULAR GREEN TEA – As the most consumed Japanese green tea, sencha tea accounts for nearly 80% of the country's tea production. Our sencha green tea loose leaf undergoes a traditional gentle steaming process to preserve its natural nutrients and deliver a refreshing, umami-rich taste. This loose organic green tea is ideal for daily drinking, and thanks to its high quality, it adapts beautifully to various brewing preferences – from deep-steamed (fukamushi) to light-steamed sencha.

CAREFULLY CURATED, SMALL-BATCH BLENDED TEA – Our team of experienced tea masters carefully selects the finest organic green tea leaves, predominantly from the first harvest of Yabukita and Saemidori cultivars. The result is a beautifully balanced organic sencha green tea loose leaf that highlights the natural sweetness, astringency, and aromatic complexity of Japanese loose green tea. We blend in small batches for maximum freshness and flavor consistency across every cup.

FAR-INFRARED ROASTED FOR DEPTH AND FLAVOR – The secret to our distinctive flavor lies in our expert roasting method. Using far-infrared roasting, we unlock the tea’s deep umami and signature fragrance, giving this green tea loose a warm, full-bodied character. This special roasting method enhances the inherent sweetness and smooth finish of organic Japanese loose leaf green tea, setting it apart from standard commercial teas.

VERSATILE HOT & COLD BREW OPTIONS – Whether you prefer a warm cup of comfort or a cool, invigorating refresher, our sencha green tea adapts to your needs. For a revitalizing hot brew, steep the green loose leaf tea at lower temperatures to enjoy its healthful catechins and gentle bitterness. For summer days, try Mizudashi (cold brew) – simply steep in cold water to produce a smoother, naturally sweet green leaf tea organic with a crisp taste and reduced caffeine. Ideal for tea ceremonies, daily drinking, or pairing with traditional Japanese sweets.

This winter, enjoy premium Japanese specialty foods and teas from Yamasan Kyoto Uji—perfect as gifts for others, a self-indulgent treat, or for creating a festive Christmas feast to share with family and friends.

I then did some searching online for "best green tea" and Ito En came up a few times, so I decided to give it a try. One person found this helpful Helpful Report  N8 - Honest Reviewer 5.0 out of 5 stars  If you are going to ice tea. Do it rite, please...... Reviewed in the United States on June 24, 2020 Verified Purchase First off. This tea changed my life. It helped me quit a lot of negative drinking habits I’ve had. Like drinking energy drinks all day. I’ve cut out soda and pretty much any drinks with sugar in them. If you don’t want the results pictured in some above reviews and pictures. There is an easy solution. Common sense! Consider the serving size of the bag compared to the cup it’s being placed in. Also if your are going to ice tea. Then ICE the darn tea. Not some half hearted attempt to make yourself unhappy. Now!, to attain that awesome dark green goodness that gives me a rush of energy and focus to start my day. I take 3 bags. Place them into a core water bottle. Carefully insert ice cubes from my fridge dispenser till about 1/4 way full then the rest with cold water. Let sit for 15-20 min. Shake it up rite away and a few times while waiting. I promise this will not destroy the flavor. If you consider we are cold brewing here. You will understand the factors at play over hot brewing. I leave the bags in the bottle till I’m done with the beverage. No sour or bitter taste. Just remember to keep it cold. There are so many good things that come out of this tea when cold brewed properly and in higher concentrations because they are not getting destroyed by heat. This tea is amazing enough to drink straight but if you need a sweet kick that won’t neurologically rot your brain like so many artificial sweeteners do. I prefer stevia. Sweet drops to be specific. They pair well together and I add them at the same time I pour the cold water in and the flavor does not sour even if left in fridge for a hour or two. This one bottle I try to enjoy over the course of an hour or less if it’s warming up. Once it’s gets warm and sits for a while. item_details.Flavor: (224) Texture(51) Aroma(31) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Nicholas 5.0 out of 5 stars  Great Sencha at a much lower price, when brewed correctly Reviewed in the United States on September 1, 2025 Verified Purchase At the time I bought this, it was almsot 2$ an ounce, which is far less than most other brands are selling it for. The sencha is good quality, and tastes just like any other sencha ive had before. If you brew it properly, it will not be bitter. (Edit: After tasting some better quality sencha from places like Sugimoto and Ippodo, I can definitely see why some people consider this to be lower quality or not as good. It's not bad, but compared to high quality sencha it has far less umami and a lot more astringency per cup. However, if you just want some sencha to drink every day and don't care about getting something premium, this still tastes good and the price definitely makes it worth it.) For sencha, I brew it by pouring 12 oz of water thats 175 degrees Fahrenheit* over 2 tsp of sencha and letting it steep for 1 minute, then pouring into the cup to serve. I do a second steep with the same leaves at 45 seconds, and then a third at 30 seconds**. If you want a nice flavor, use a kyusu teapot and cover with lid while steeping***. Leave the teapot lid slightly off to let moisture and steam escape while the tea leaves are not steeping in between brews. You can experiment with how long to infuse your tea for your liking, as well as the proportions of water to tea, to get the flavor you like best. *Be sure not to use boiling water as this will scorch the leaves and cause them to release compounds that will make the tea taste bitter. It is best to take boiling water and cool it using a japanese water cooling vessel called a yuzamashi, as it is specifically designed for the purpose. Boiling the water before cooling it makes the water softer and much better for tea, instead of just heating the water directly to the right temperature and then stopping. (Water softness has to do with the amount of dissolved hard minerals in it, and boiling removes some of these hard minerals for a better taste) **Multiple short infusions are preferred here because the water remains the correct temperature throughout most of the brewing process, and provides the best extraction for this type of tea by controlling how much bitter compounds get released into the tea. If you were to use one long infusion like 4 to 5 minutes and then throw the leaves out after, you would be a much colder temperature by the time the infusion was done, and the tea would be very bitter. ***You can use any porcelain or clay teapot if you have one as long as it has a lid, but be sure to strain the leaves and put them back in the teapot. A kyusu is better though because it doesnt move the leaves around as much as it has a built in strainer. Moving the leaves around too much risks releasing more of those bitter compounds and making the tea taste bitter. Read more 23 people found this helpful Helpful Report  E. K. Arnold 5.0 out of 5 stars  Drink this and feel like a ninja Reviewed in the United States on May 16, 2023 Verified Purchase This is a pretty decent sencha that balances price and quality and comes from Japan. The flavor is robust yet not muddied, with hints of crispness. The price is fair for the quality and quantity. A 4oz bag of loose sen-cha at aa typical grocery store is about $8-$9 and this is better quality. You get 4x as much tea for 2x the price. I was drinking gunpowder green for a while, which is decent and inexpensive, but this sen-cha's flavor blows it out of the water. The one issue here is there are no steeping instructions unless you are fluent in Japanese. this is critical to making a perfect cup. If you oversteep, the tea will be too bitter. If you understeep, the flavor won't be released. Also you need to get the proportion of tea to water right. I boiled water in an electric kettle and let it cool down for like 30 seconds after reaching a boil. I put about 30 Ml (1 tblspn) of loose tea in a tea strainer and poured into a 20 oz cup filled almost (but not quite) to the top, so that's probably about 16-18 actual ounces of liquid, or approximately 2 average 8 oz tea cups. I let steep for 3 minutes (with a kitchen timer). this results in a robust sen-cha that is on the strong side but not overly-so. In general, i would say, let it steep for 2-3 minutes depending on how strong you want it. if you use less tea, you could probably let it steep for longer but you will run the risk of making it too bitter. i find that 1 tblspn/15 Ml per 8-10 oz cup is the right ratio. One full 20 oz. cup, when properly brewed and steeped, gives a nice mix of green tea antioxidants and caffeinated energy without getting you too wired. Again, steep for 3 minutes max. I have one of these every morning. I typically don't drink green tea all day as the caffeine will catch up to you eventually but YMMV. bullets: [Blissful Hot Brew Experience] For hot brewing: Steep 0.21 oz of leaves in 6 fl oz of water at 176–194°F for 40–60 seconds. This brings out the elegant balance of umami and gentle sharpness found in organic sencha green tea loose leaf. For a lighter everyday brew, use 0.07–0.11 oz (2–3 g) of leaves with the same amount of water. Depending on brewing strength, one 80 g bag makes about 13–40 cups of tea. Sencha leaves can typically be brewed 2–3 times, allowing you to enjoy multiple cups from the same leaves while experiencing the refined character expected from premium loose leaf green tea organic.

[Refreshing Cold Brew, A Moment of Calm] For cold brew: Combine 0.18–0.28 oz of tea leaves with 17 fl oz of water and refrigerate for about 4 hours. Low-temperature extraction brings out a smooth sweetness while reducing bitterness, delivering the serene taste appreciated in green tea loose leaf organic. This gentle profile also aligns with the mellow character found in green tea organic loose leaf, making it ideal for relaxing before bed.

[Flavor Loved Worldwide] This sencha is crafted from carefully selected tea leaves grown in Kagoshima and certified organic, offering a mellow umami and refined aroma. As an authentic sencha tea, it provides the clean, refreshing taste expected of premium green tea, making it enjoyable even when brewed with hard water. Produced under the HAJIME line by BJDesign, this tea reflects the essence of traditional Japanese craftsmanship.

[Comprehensive Wellness Support] Our organic sencha green tea naturally contains catechins and amino acids appreciated for daily wellness support. As a traditional japanese green tea loose leaf, it provides a smooth, balanced flavor profile. Fans of loose leaf green tea enjoy its clarity and depth, while sencha green tea loose leaf offers the harmony of aroma and astringency characteristic of high-quality Japanese teas.

[Elevate Your Everyday Moments] Whether enjoyed on its own, paired with traditional sweets, or served in Japanese cuisine, this versatile organic loose leaf green tea complements any setting. Its refined flavor also appeals to those who appreciate the rich, layered taste of organic sencha green tea loose leaf. Net weight: 80 g. Reseal tightly after opening and store away from heat and humidity to maintain freshness.

important_information.Directions: For Hot Sencha: Steep 0.21 oz (approximately 3 teaspoons) of tea leaves in 6 fl oz (about 3/4 cup) of hot water at 176-194°F for 40-60 seconds. For Cold Brew Sencha: Place 0.18-0.28 oz of tea leaves in 17 fl oz of water, then extract in the refrigerator for approximately 4 hours.

bullets: Hong Kong-style milk tea is a popular tea drink made from Ceylon black tea and milk. It is usually part of Hongkongers' tea culture, typically served as part of afternoon tea but also at breakfast or dinner.

[Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The tea taste is more bitter and astringent, and the taste is smooth and mellow. The tea has a strong flavour and a long-lasting milk fragrance. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

item_details.Flavor: Profile: The Perfect Balance ​The most impressive part of these blends is the flavor balance. Often, instant teas are either sugar-bombs or unpleasantly sharp, but these hit the "goldilocks" zone. ​Not Too Sweet: There is just enough sweetness to make it a treat, but it doesn't leave that heavy, sugary aftertaste. It feels light enough to drink every day. ​Not Too Bitter: Even the matcha—which can sometimes be harsh—is incredibly smooth. There is no lingering bitterness, just a clean finish. ​Just Right: The ratio of tea to creaminess is spot on, allowing the natural notes of the green and black teas to come through clearly. ​Versatility ​While these are designed for a quick hot drink, they are surprisingly versatile: ​Iced Latte: Dissolve the packet in a small amount of hot water first, then pour over ice and cold milk. ​Smoothie Boost: Toss a matcha packet into a fruit smoothie for an easy flavor upgrade. ​On the Road: If you're traveling or headed outdoors, these are ideal because they only require hot water to feel like a high-end cafe drink. item_details.Flavor: Profile: The Perfect Balance ​The most impressive part of these blends is the flavor balance. Often, instant teas are either sugar-bombs or unpleasantly sharp, but these hit the "goldilocks" zone. ​Not Too Sweet: There is just enough sweetness to make it a treat, but it doesn't leave that heavy, sugary aftertaste. It feels light enough to drink every day. ​Not Too Bitter: Even the matcha—which can sometimes be harsh—is incredibly smooth. There is no lingering bitterness, just a clean finish. ​Just Right: The ratio of tea to creaminess is spot on, allowing the natural notes of the green and black teas to come through clearly. ​Versatility ​While these are designed for a quick hot drink, they are surprisingly versatile: ​Iced Latte: Dissolve the packet in a small amount of hot water first, then pour over ice and cold milk. ​Smoothie Boost: Toss a matcha packet into a fruit smoothie for an easy flavor upgrade. ​On the Road: If you're traveling or headed outdoors, these are ideal because they only require hot water to feel like a high-end cafe drink. Enjoy 5 people found this helpful Helpful Report  Terry Chance 4.0 out of 5 stars  Not restaurant Thai tea but not bad either… Reviewed in the United States on June 28, 2021 Size: 12 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I never know how to rate this kind of product. Do you rate it against another instant tea or against the best you have ever had in a restaurant or even homemade? I have had Thai tea in a few different restaurants and have brewed some at home. This tea in no way stands up to those. It simply doesn’t have the depth of flavor of brewed Thai tea. However, it gives a pretty good account of itself and definitely tastes like Thai tea. It’s not like you drink it and think, what is this. My wife loves it but hasn’t has any brewed Thai tea in a restaurant. As far as strength, the directions call for only 7oz of water per packet. You can’t dump this into a large glass or coffee mug and get much taste. So a 14oz coffee mug would take two packets and maybe slightly less water if you really want deeper flavor. It actually has sugar and is fairly sweet. I sometimes use the small styrofoam 8oz cups and fill it to about 1/4” from the top and it comes out great. So, I am going to it give it 4 stars. It is not restaurant quality but is a good quick fix. If I had never had restaurant Thai tea, like my wife, I would have thought this is great but it has to be made according to the directions. Also, I originally bought this at a Korean store on a whim. I figured that it couldn’t be that good but what the heck. I was pleasantly surprised that it didn’t had an artificial sweetener taste. The store is an hour and a half away so I checked Amazon and there it was. I have ordered it a couple of times so far and will probably continue to do so. bullets: Easy to Prepare, Barista-Style Milk Tea in Minutes: Skip the long brewing time our Thai Tea Milk Tea Powder simplifies your tea-making process without compromising on quality. This instant formula is ideal for home users, busy baristas, or bubble tea shops looking to serve consistent quality with speed.

Perfect Pairing for Bubble Tea: Level up your bubble tea game with our Thai Tea Milk Tea Powder. It pairs perfectly with black boba pearls, crystal tapioca, grass jelly, or any topping of your choice.
Packaging for Freshness and Convenience: Our Thai Tea Milk Tea Powder comes in a durable bag that keeps the powder fresh and protected from moisture, light, and air.

important_information.Directions: Add 2 teaspoons of the Thai Tea Mix to 1 cup of boiling water. Drain out Tea Mix with a strainer. Add 2-3 teaspoons of sugar or to liking. Stir well and serve with ice. *Add a slice of lemon for lemon Ice Tea** Ice Tea with Milk: Add 2 teaspoons of the Thai Tea Mix to 1 cup of boiling water. Drain out Tea Mix with a strainer. Add 2-3 teaspoons of sugar and 1-2 teaspoons of condensed milk or to liking. Stir well and serve with ice.

bullets: Big Train Dragonfly Thai Tea Blended Crème: A sweet, Thai tea mix that you can mix and sip in an instant. Whether you want to enjoy a frappe or boba tea, our Thai tea mix makes it easy to enjoy your favorite drinks right at home

Wherever Beverages Are Served: Big Train Dragonfly Thai Tea Blended Crème Beverage Mix brings the taste of coffeeshop-style frappes and boba tea to your home or restaurant. Our drink mix makes it easy to enjoy blended drinks wherever you are

Blend, Pour, Serve: Big Train mixes make it easy to serve up delicious drinks. From our variety of chai lattes, to our blended crème and coffee frappes, Big Train provides quick to prepare beverage solutions for coffee shops, restaurants and at home

Try Every Flavor: Our entire line is crave-worthy. Seasonal delights like Spiced or Vanilla Chai Tea Lattes, classic Blended Ice Coffee, kid-friendly and more – Big Train mixes come in all kinds of on-trend flavors to satisfy any kind of appetite

Big Train Quality: Better beverages are a blend away. For over 30 years, Big Train has made it easy to provide high quality beverages made with people and the planet in mind. We're committed to consistency and sustainability in each mix we create

important_information.Directions: To make iced tea: Steep 3 Number One Thai Original Extra Gold tea bags in 8 oz of boiling water for 2-3 minutes. Add 2-3 teaspoons of sugar. Serve with ice. To make lemon iced tea, add a slice of lemon. To make iced tea with milk: Make tea using the same method as detailed above. Add 2-3 teaspoons of sugar and 1-2 teaspoons of condensed milk. Stir well and serve with ice.

bullets: AUTHENTIC KOREAN HERBAL TEA – Crafted with premium roasted barley, known as Boricha in Korea and Mugicha in Japan, delivering a smooth and nutty taste enjoyed for generations.
SMOOTH & NUTTY AROMA – Naturally roasted for a rich, aromatic flavor that’s comforting and refreshing — perfect for daily tea time.
ENJOY HOT OR COLD – Brew warm for a soothing cup in winter or chill for a refreshing iced tea in summer. One tea fits every season and occasion.
CAFFEINE-FREE & ZERO CALORIES – A healthy choice for the whole family. Naturally caffeine-free, sugar-free, and non-caloric — safe to enjoy any time of the day.
CONVENIENT TEA BAGS – Each box includes 50 individually wrapped 1.5 g tea bags (75 g total). Easy to brew at home, at work, or on the go.

Helpful Report  MIZUSHI SATOH 5.0 out of 5 stars  ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru - A Refreshing Taste of Japan Reviewed in the United States on September 9, 2023 Verified Purchase As a fan of Japanese culture and beverages, I recently had the pleasure of trying the ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru, and it's safe to say that it left a lasting impression. First and foremost, the packaging exudes elegance and simplicity, which is characteristic of many Japanese products. The tea bags are individually wrapped, ensuring freshness and convenience. The design reflects the attention to detail that is synonymous with Japanese craftsmanship. Upon brewing, the aroma is what truly stands out. The "Kaori Kaoru" (fragrance and flavor) aspect of this tea lives up to its name. The scent is subtly nutty and earthy, evoking a sense of tranquility and comfort. It's a wonderful departure from typical herbal teas and a delightful journey into the world of roasted barley. Taste-wise, this barley tea is both soothing and refreshing. It has a mild, toasty flavor profile with just a hint of sweetness, making it a perfect companion for both warm and cold servings. It's worth noting that this tea is naturally caffeine-free, which makes it suitable for sipping throughout the day or in the evening without any concerns about sleep disruption. The ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru is not just a delightful beverage; it also boasts potential health benefits. Barley tea is known for its antioxidants and potential digestive aid properties. While it may not be a miracle elixir, it certainly adds to the appeal of this tea as a health-conscious choice. However, there's one caveat to be aware of: the tea bags are on the small side, and if you prefer a stronger brew, you might need to use multiple bags or steep them for a longer time. This isn't a major issue, but it's something to keep in mind if you enjoy a bolder flavor. In conclusion, ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru is a delightful and aromatic tea that offers a genuine taste of Japan. Whether you're a seasoned tea connoisseur or just someone looking to explore new flavors, this tea is worth a try. Its elegance, soothing qualities, and potential health benefits make it a standout choice among barley teas. So, sit back, relax, and let the fragrant essence of Japan take you on a sensory journey with each sip. bullets: JAPANESE MUGI-CHA BARLEY TEA BAGS – Mugi-cha is a traditional roasted barley tea and naturally caffeine free, which means you can drink it at anytime of day, hot or iced. The earthy brew from our Mugi-cha Tea Bags are smooth, flavorful, and easy to drink. We hope each invigorating sip of our roasted barley tea brings a refreshing and soothing sense of calm and focus to your day. This authentic Japanese tea comes with 32 loose teabags per pack to last you multiple cups of tea with one order.

GOOD FOR HEALTH – Barley teas are full of nutrients and beneficial to your wellbeing in various ways, and drinking such a tasty blend makes it so easy to enjoy while reaping some positive health benefits for overall wellness. This natural roasted barley tea has a lovely aroma, beautiful brown color, nutty flavor, and mellow taste for you to love. It’s the perfect daily drink to start your day or to wind down after a busy workday. Tasteful for anyone to enjoy anytime, anywhere.

DELICIOUS DRINK FOR ANYONE – Take a sweet morning or afternoon tea break with this Japanese roasted barley tea! A classic favorite tea in Japan, this features a perfect harmony and balance of flavor with heavy roasted notes and malty flavor. It is great to drink along with any meals. With all-natural caffeine-free content and rich aromatic flavor in every teabag, prepare a hot or cold cup of this tea to take with you on-the-go to work or school, or to relax with during your daily teatime.

EXCELLENT GIFT FOR ANY OCCASION – This Mugi-cha is an ideal present to give to friends, family, relatives, students, loved ones, colleagues, clients, and acquaintances as it is a hearty herbal natural drink and supports good health. Showing appreciation and care for others’ wellbeing is a great gesture and can be shown with this uncaffeinated tea as a gift. Give on any occasion such as for holidays, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Easter, Mother's Day, Father’s Day, birthdays, or housewarming gift.

EASY TO PREPARE – For iced Mugi-cha, place one tea bag into a pitcher and steep in a half-gallon of cold water in the refrigerator for several hours. For hot Mugi-cha, place 1 tea bag into a pitcher and steep in a half-gallon of hot water for 5 minutes. Experience the taste of a new culture with this authentic quality Japanese barley tea. Perfect to enjoy on-the-go, this premium Japan grown tea comes in single serving teabags that brews well and are travel sized to take with you anywhere.

important_information.Safety Information: This product is labelled to United States standards and may differ from similar products sold elsewhere in its ingredients, labeling and allergen warnings Ingredients Roasted barley grains.
important_information.Directions: For cold brewing, simply throw in a pack in a pitcher of cold water and let steep for several hours. Best when chilled. To have hot Mugi-cha, simply boil 1 pack in a kettle with a liter of water for 3 to 5 minutes and drink up. OR throw 1 pack into a large mug and pour over hot water. Remove bag in a few minutes, or until tea reaches desired strength.

bullets: 🌾 100% PURE ROASTED BARLEY GRAINS - Made with premium roasted barley grains, carefully selected for optimal flavor and aroma. Our tea contains no fillers, no artificial flavors, and no additives. Each bag delivers the authentic nutty, toasty taste of traditional roasted barley tea for your daily wellness routine.

💚 SUPPORTS DIGESTIVE HEALTH & AFTER MEAL WELLNESS - Roasted barley tea has been traditionally used to support healthy digestion and comfort after meals. Enjoy this soothing caffeine-free tea after breakfast, lunch, or dinner to complement your digestive wellness goals. *These statements have not been evaluated by the FDA.

☕ NATURALLY CAFFEINE-FREE - ANY TIME ENJOYMENT - Unlike coffee, black tea, or green tea, our barley tea contains zero caffeine. Perfect for morning, afternoon, or evening consumption without affecting sleep. Ideal for those reducing caffeine intake or seeking a coffee alternative.

✅ CERTIFIED SAFE & CLEAN INGREDIENTS - Vegan, Non-GMO, Sugar-Free, and No Additives. Our tea bags are made with natural plant-based filters, ensuring no microplastics or harmful chemicals leach into your brew. Perfect for health-conscious consumers seeking pure herbal wellness.

📦 VALUE PACK - 75 PREMIUM TEA BAGS - More than standard 50-count competitors, our 75-count box provides 2-3 months of daily use. Each bag contains premium roasted barley grains for optimal flavor and potency. Enjoy hot as a warming beverage or chilled as refreshing iced tea. Better value at a lower price.

Reviewed in the United States on April 13, 2026 Verified Purchase I thought I would give Green Tea a shot again as I am a strict Assam & Ceylon drinker... I needed some variety and maybe not as much caffeine sometimes... so I gave this brand a shot and did not regret it! For bagged tea, this is really great quality flavor, the tea has a very nutty like aroma and vegetal mouth feel at first, and as you swallow you get very subtle echoes of a floral tea note in there, it's quite beautiful how it does that when you drink it. My experience with Senchas has been just like drinking grass water...But this one is a total delight! Tips for newbies.. use two tea bags at a time for full flavor. When it comes to Green Tea, you want to watch the kettle and do not hard boil the water because you will scorch the delicate Tea and it will turn brown and taste really bad. You want the water just starting to crack bubbles and then you pour the water, then only steep the tea bags for 2 exact minutes which will leave you with a bright green hued tea. Enjoy! bullets: ✓ Premium Japanese Ceremonial Grade Matcha, Fresh from Japan - Made from shade grown, First Harvest tea leaves from Uji Kyoto. The tencha is only ground into powder right before it leaves Japan for the USA, and then sealed into air-tight packets. This gets you extremely fresh, quality Uji matcha to be enjoyed right here in America.

✓ Smooth, Balanced And Versatile, Ideal For Matcha Beginners - This matcha ceremonial grade green tea powder is smooth with balanced umami with a just a tiny hint of bitterness. It is the perfect matcha for beginners looking to make matcha lattes, or matcha teas (usucha).We recommend using this for recipes where matcha is the main ingredient.

✓ Improve Your Focus, Boost Energy Without Coffee – Greatly increase your focus and energy by drinking Naoki Matcha. Unlike the typical caffeine rush from coffee, the amino acid L-theanine in Naoki Matcha moderates the effects of caffeine and helps to relax the mind and body while providing a steady boost of energy for up to 6 hours. Matcha is also naturally gluten and sugar free, and is a healthy source of antioxidants.

✓ We Want To Help You Enjoy Matcha – To ensure you have the best matcha experience, we provide our full guidance through directions for use, recipes and tips for enjoying it. Whether you like to drink matcha as a tea, or to mix it up as a latte or smoothie, we do not think there’s a right or wrong way to enjoy matcha. Our 1.4 oz / 40g tin serves a total of 20 servings. 1 tsp (2 grams) of matcha powder makes either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte.

✓ Authentic Japanese Matcha From Uji – Uji is home to Japanese matcha culture and many of the tea estates have accumulated centuries of know-how and techniques. This blend of matcha is produced in Uji using these very same best practices.

important_information.Safety Information: Due to its caffeine content, it is advised that children and pregnant women avoid consuming this product. Ingredients Green Tea Leaves
important_information.Directions: 1. Use 1 teaspoon (2 grams) of Naoki Matcha powder for either a cup of matcha tea (usucha) or a small matcha latte. 2. For matcha tea, whisk the powder in hot water until frothy. 3. For matcha latte, mix the powder with steamed milk. 4. Enjoy your Naoki Matcha drink, which can help improve focus and boost energy without a coffee crash. 5. Follow the full guidance and tips for use provided by the manufacturer to ensure the best matcha experience.

Great Product and Price! Reviewed in the United States on March 10, 2026 Size: 20 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase Harney & Sons makes gorgeous teas. I have not tried them all, but quite a lot of them. I prefer the sachets because the ingredients are fully whole and visible, and they are a joy to behold. Now...cherries are my favorite fruit. I love everything cherry. Having said this, I wasn't expecting the cherry in this tea. I drink my tea without sweetening it. I drew a fragrant mouthful and the sour cherry took over. I felt my mouth itself pucker. It is what it claims. I will use sweetener next time to counteract the tartness. It will be delicious. 2 people found this helpful Helpful Report  LisaB 5.0 out of 5 stars  You just have to try it! Reviewed in the United States on January 10, 2026 Size: 20 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase My sister gifted me a couple of tins of this tea in a basket she put together at Christmas. I have always been 'loyal' to one particular brand, so this was different for me, and I immediately fell in love with the Harney and Sons brand. The flavor was so much more robust and tasty, even the scent was more powerful. The Cherry Blossom tea caught my attention right away, and it's the first one I tried. I love cherry flavors, the idea of the blossom intrigued me, and did not disappoint. So of course I wanted to try all of the flavors this brand offers. Knowing that these are sold in most box stores, I thought I would try there first, only to find that many of the flavors were not available in-store. So I ordered several on Amazon, and they came right away. I have seen videos of people from other countries gathering fresh herbs and flowers right from their gardens and steeping fresh teas. So the Cherry Blossom tea, the Peppermint Herbal, Vanilla Comoro, and Hot Cinnamon, greatly appealed to me. Popping open each tin and enjoying the fresh rich aromas is as satisfying as actually drinking the tea. I wanted something that would stand on it's own, without added sweetener, or cream, and these do taste great. The tins themselves are cute and look nice in the cupboards, they organize well and lock in the freshness. If you haven't tried this brand, I highly recommend you do. bullets: CHERRY BLOSSOM TEA, Flavored Green Tea: Inspired by an April visit to Tokyo, it's like a springtime awakening of the senses. Refreshing green tea with the bright, juicy flavor of cherries.

Once, Mike and Brigitte Harney were in Tokyo in early April, and the weather was quite chilly. Nothing was blooming yet, until a brief warm spell came. The word on everyone's lips was sakura! All of Tokyo was happy that the cherry tree had blossomed. It is to celebrate the rite of spring in Tokyo and Washington, DC, that we created this green tea.

PART OF OUR HT LINE OF TEAS A family collaboration gave rise to HT: Unique & Uncommon Tea blends. HT is grounded in the Harney tradition of providing the finest quality full-leaf teas and herbs, all packed in a stunning silken tea sachet. You can now enjoy the sophistication of full-leaf teas with teabags convenience.

Caffeine Content: Contains Caffeine 40 to 60 milligrams per cup. Tin of 20 sachets. Directions: Use one sachet for two cups of tea. Pour less than boiling water (175F) over the sachet. Infuse for 3 minutes. Remove the sachet.
HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET Joining 1% for The Planet meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice.

important_information.Safety Information: May contain allergens. Not suitable for individuals with known allergies to cherries or vanilla. Ingredients Green tea, natural cherry flavor, natural vanilla flavor.
important_information.Directions: Tea is only as good as the water it is brewed in. Use filtered water as needed. Use one sachet for two cups* of tea. Pour 175F water over the tea and steep for 3 minutes. Remove the sachet. Relax and enjoy. *We judge a cup of tea using a standard, traditional teacup. So, in these instructions, two cups of tea equates to approximately 10 to 12 ounces of tea.

HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET. Joining 1% for The Planet in 2006 meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice. Harney & Sons was founded on a commitment to deliver customers the finest quality tea possible. This promise, made over 30 years ago, serves as the company's guiding principle. Today, Harney & Sons Tea remains family owned and managed, with three generations of Harney's preserving John's tradition of fine tea and traveling the world in search of the finest ingredients. It is not only the Harney mission to deliver quality tea products to their customers, but also to educate the world of tea history and taste. Whether through their dedicated customer service team, their published guides to tea drinking, or their two tea tasting shops, the Harney & Sons team works to pass on their passion of tea to a wide audience. From lugging heavy tea filled chests down their basement stairs, to stocking shelves at stores nationwide, Harney & Sons remains committed to delivering their customers a superior tea drinking experience.

bullets: ORGANIC SENCHA GREEN TEA – Certified 100% organic by JONA and JAS, our premium organic Japanese green tea loose leaf is grown in the heart of Uji, Kyoto – a region globally recognized for its superior Japanese tea production. Handpicked from a tea plantation with a 350-year legacy, our organic sencha green tea captures centuries of Japanese craftsmanship. Enjoy an authentic experience with one of the finest loose leaf teas that Japan has to offer, completely free from additives and grown without genetically modified ingredients.

SENCHA LOOSE LEAF TEA – JAPAN’S MOST POPULAR GREEN TEA – As the most consumed Japanese green tea, sencha tea accounts for nearly 80% of the country's tea production. Our sencha green tea loose leaf undergoes a traditional gentle steaming process to preserve its natural nutrients and deliver a refreshing, umami-rich taste. This loose organic green tea is ideal for daily drinking, and thanks to its high quality, it adapts beautifully to various brewing preferences – from deep-steamed (fukamushi) to light-steamed sencha.

CAREFULLY CURATED, SMALL-BATCH BLENDED TEA – Our team of experienced tea masters carefully selects the finest organic green tea leaves, predominantly from the first harvest of Yabukita and Saemidori cultivars. The result is a beautifully balanced organic sencha green tea loose leaf that highlights the natural sweetness, astringency, and aromatic complexity of Japanese loose green tea. We blend in small batches for maximum freshness and flavor consistency across every cup.

FAR-INFRARED ROASTED FOR DEPTH AND FLAVOR – The secret to our distinctive flavor lies in our expert roasting method. Using far-infrared roasting, we unlock the tea’s deep umami and signature fragrance, giving this green tea loose a warm, full-bodied character. This special roasting method enhances the inherent sweetness and smooth finish of organic Japanese loose leaf green tea, setting it apart from standard commercial teas.

VERSATILE HOT & COLD BREW OPTIONS – Whether you prefer a warm cup of comfort or a cool, invigorating refresher, our sencha green tea adapts to your needs. For a revitalizing hot brew, steep the green loose leaf tea at lower temperatures to enjoy its healthful catechins and gentle bitterness. For summer days, try Mizudashi (cold brew) – simply steep in cold water to produce a smoother, naturally sweet green leaf tea organic with a crisp taste and reduced caffeine. Ideal for tea ceremonies, daily drinking, or pairing with traditional Japanese sweets.

This winter, enjoy premium Japanese specialty foods and teas from Yamasan Kyoto Uji—perfect as gifts for others, a self-indulgent treat, or for creating a festive Christmas feast to share with family and friends.

bullets: MATCHA TEA BAGS: These matcha tea bags are perfect hot or iced. Drink hot as a substitute for your morning coffee, or brew & ice for a refreshing, afternoon beverage for the tea drinker on the go.
GRAB A QUICK CUP: When life is too hectic for a leisurely cup of loose leaf tea, we offer this line of tea bag products for the same delicious flavor, conveniently packaged in individual tea bags.
TRY THEM ALL: We make a wide variety of delicious tea blends with chamomile, matcha, oolong, mint, peach, hibiscus & more. You can enjoy them as loose leaf teas, tea bags, bottled teas & powders.
SUSTAINABLE TEAS: We partner with the Japanese farming community to preserve the art & craft of tea harvesting. It's a part of our responsibility to the planet that starts in the fields of Japan.

THE ITO EN PHILOSOPHY: We believe green tea is a gift nature has given to us to share with others. Our premium quality teas always deliver good taste & unmatched health properties, from the ground up.

Helpful Report  MIZUSHI SATOH 5.0 out of 5 stars  ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru - A Refreshing Taste of Japan Reviewed in the United States on September 9, 2023 Verified Purchase As a fan of Japanese culture and beverages, I recently had the pleasure of trying the ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru, and it's safe to say that it left a lasting impression. First and foremost, the packaging exudes elegance and simplicity, which is characteristic of many Japanese products. The tea bags are individually wrapped, ensuring freshness and convenience. The design reflects the attention to detail that is synonymous with Japanese craftsmanship. Upon brewing, the aroma is what truly stands out. The "Kaori Kaoru" (fragrance and flavor) aspect of this tea lives up to its name. The scent is subtly nutty and earthy, evoking a sense of tranquility and comfort. It's a wonderful departure from typical herbal teas and a delightful journey into the world of roasted barley. Taste-wise, this barley tea is both soothing and refreshing. It has a mild, toasty flavor profile with just a hint of sweetness, making it a perfect companion for both warm and cold servings. It's worth noting that this tea is naturally caffeine-free, which makes it suitable for sipping throughout the day or in the evening without any concerns about sleep disruption. The ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru is not just a delightful beverage; it also boasts potential health benefits. Barley tea is known for its antioxidants and potential digestive aid properties. While it may not be a miracle elixir, it certainly adds to the appeal of this tea as a health-conscious choice. However, there's one caveat to be aware of: the tea bags are on the small side, and if you prefer a stronger brew, you might need to use multiple bags or steep them for a longer time. This isn't a major issue, but it's something to keep in mind if you enjoy a bolder flavor. In conclusion, ITO EN Japanese Barley Tea Kaori Kaoru is a delightful and aromatic tea that offers a genuine taste of Japan. Whether you're a seasoned tea connoisseur or just someone looking to explore new flavors, this tea is worth a try. Its elegance, soothing qualities, and potential health benefits make it a standout choice among barley teas. So, sit back, relax, and let the fragrant essence of Japan take you on a sensory journey with each sip. [Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The tea taste is more bitter and astringent, and the taste is smooth and mellow. The tea has a strong flavour and a long-lasting milk fragrance. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

item_details.Flavor: ** The taste is superbly balanced, with a smooth creaminess that perfectly complements the robust flavor of black tea. It has just the right amount of sweetness, making it a great choice for those who enjoy a classic milk tea without the need for additional sugar. **Convenience:** Preparation is incredibly easy. Just add hot water to the powder, and you have a delicious cup of milk tea ready in seconds. It's perfect for busy mornings or when you need a quick pick-me-up during the day. **Portability:** The 280g package is resealable, which helps keep the tea fresh and makes it convenient to store. The size is ideal for taking to the office or even on trips, ensuring I can enjoy my favorite beverage anywhere. **Versatility:** Beyond being enjoyed hot, it also makes a refreshing iced tea. Simply dissolve the mix in a small amount of hot water, add cold water and ice, and you have a refreshing iced milk tea. It pairs well with a variety of snacks or desserts. **Conclusion:** Overall, the Nitto Kocha Instant Royal Milk Tea is a fantastic product for anyone who loves milk tea. It’s flavorful, convenient, and versatile, making it a great addition to any tea lover’s collection. I highly recommend giving it a try! item_details.Flavor: Profile: The Perfect Balance ​The most impressive part of these blends is the flavor balance. Often, instant teas are either sugar-bombs or unpleasantly sharp, but these hit the "goldilocks" zone. ​Not Too Sweet: There is just enough sweetness to make it a treat, but it doesn't leave that heavy, sugary aftertaste. It feels light enough to drink every day. ​Not Too Bitter: Even the matcha—which can sometimes be harsh—is incredibly smooth. There is no lingering bitterness, just a clean finish. ​Just Right: The ratio of tea to creaminess is spot on, allowing the natural notes of the green and black teas to come through clearly. ​Versatility ​While these are designed for a quick hot drink, they are surprisingly versatile: ​Iced Latte: Dissolve the packet in a small amount of hot water first, then pour over ice and cold milk. ​Smoothie Boost: Toss a matcha packet into a fruit smoothie for an easy flavor upgrade. ​On the Road: If you're traveling or headed outdoors, these are ideal because they only require hot water to feel like a high-end cafe drink. bullets: Hong Kong-style milk tea is a popular tea drink made from Ceylon black tea and milk. It is usually part of Hongkongers' tea culture, typically served as part of afternoon tea but also at breakfast or dinner.

[Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The tea taste is more bitter and astringent, and the taste is smooth and mellow. The tea has a strong flavour and a long-lasting milk fragrance. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

item_details.Flavor: ** The taste is superbly balanced, with a smooth creaminess that perfectly complements the robust flavor of black tea. It has just the right amount of sweetness, making it a great choice for those who enjoy a classic milk tea without the need for additional sugar. **Convenience:** Preparation is incredibly easy. Just add hot water to the powder, and you have a delicious cup of milk tea ready in seconds. It's perfect for busy mornings or when you need a quick pick-me-up during the day. **Portability:** The 280g package is resealable, which helps keep the tea fresh and makes it convenient to store. The size is ideal for taking to the office or even on trips, ensuring I can enjoy my favorite beverage anywhere. **Versatility:** Beyond being enjoyed hot, it also makes a refreshing iced tea. Simply dissolve the mix in a small amount of hot water, add cold water and ice, and you have a refreshing iced milk tea. It pairs well with a variety of snacks or desserts. **Conclusion:** Overall, the Nitto Kocha Instant Royal Milk Tea is a fantastic product for anyone who loves milk tea. It’s flavorful, convenient, and versatile, making it a great addition to any tea lover’s collection. I highly recommend giving it a try! bullets: Hong Kong-style milk tea is a popular tea drink made from Ceylon black tea and milk. It is usually part of Hongkongers' tea culture, typically served as part of afternoon tea but also at breakfast or dinner.

[Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The tea taste is more bitter and astringent, and the taste is smooth and mellow. The tea has a strong flavour and a long-lasting milk fragrance. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

item_details.Flavor: Profile: The Perfect Balance ​The most impressive part of these blends is the flavor balance. Often, instant teas are either sugar-bombs or unpleasantly sharp, but these hit the "goldilocks" zone. ​Not Too Sweet: There is just enough sweetness to make it a treat, but it doesn't leave that heavy, sugary aftertaste. It feels light enough to drink every day. ​Not Too Bitter: Even the matcha—which can sometimes be harsh—is incredibly smooth. There is no lingering bitterness, just a clean finish. ​Just Right: The ratio of tea to creaminess is spot on, allowing the natural notes of the green and black teas to come through clearly. ​Versatility ​While these are designed for a quick hot drink, they are surprisingly versatile: ​Iced Latte: Dissolve the packet in a small amount of hot water first, then pour over ice and cold milk. ​Smoothie Boost: Toss a matcha packet into a fruit smoothie for an easy flavor upgrade. ​On the Road: If you're traveling or headed outdoors, these are ideal because they only require hot water to feel like a high-end cafe drink. item_details.Flavor: ** The taste is superbly balanced, with a smooth creaminess that perfectly complements the robust flavor of black tea. It has just the right amount of sweetness, making it a great choice for those who enjoy a classic milk tea without the need for additional sugar. **Convenience:** Preparation is incredibly easy. Just add hot water to the powder, and you have a delicious cup of milk tea ready in seconds. It's perfect for busy mornings or when you need a quick pick-me-up during the day. **Portability:** The 280g package is resealable, which helps keep the tea fresh and makes it convenient to store. The size is ideal for taking to the office or even on trips, ensuring I can enjoy my favorite beverage anywhere. **Versatility:** Beyond being enjoyed hot, it also makes a refreshing iced tea. Simply dissolve the mix in a small amount of hot water, add cold water and ice, and you have a refreshing iced milk tea. It pairs well with a variety of snacks or desserts. **Conclusion:** Overall, the Nitto Kocha Instant Royal Milk Tea is a fantastic product for anyone who loves milk tea. It’s flavorful, convenient, and versatile, making it a great addition to any tea lover’s collection. I highly recommend giving it a try! bullets: Pure Wisconsin American Ginseng – Sourced from Hsu’s ginseng farms in Marathon County, WI, our tea bags deliver the signature earthy, bitter-sweet flavour of Wisconsin ginseng.
Convenience & Quality – Each tea bag is individually foil-wrapped to preserve freshness, aroma and potency. Just steep for 3-5 minutes in hot water for a rich, smooth ginseng infusion.
Daily Wellness Ritual – Enjoy a soothing brew any time of day — caffeine-free, sugar-free, no artificial flavours, non-GMO, vegan, and gluten-free. A great herbal tea choice for mindful living.
HERBAL ADAPTOGEN BENEFITS – American ginseng has been traditionally valued by Native American and Chinese cultures for its balancing properties. Our tea brings you that heritage in a premium form

EXPERIENCE THE TERROIR– The unique soil and climate of Marathon County give our ginseng a smooth, earthy character unlike Asian varieties. Taste the difference of North America’s native ginseng in every cup.

important_information.Directions: Place one tea bag in a cup. Pour 8-10 oz of boiling water (212°F). Steep for 3-5 minutes, or longer for a stronger brew. Remove the bag and enjoy as is, or add a touch of honey if desired.

bullets: Tasty and healthy herbal tea: Brew yourself a cup of deliciously aromatic and calming ginseng tea with our premium ginseng tea bags. Every sip of our ginseng root tea will refresh your mind and body so that you can fight off the fatigue and start your day with a renewed vigor and spirit!

100% Natural ginseng: Our American ginseng tea bags are prepared with naturally dried and crushed ginseng roots that are hand picked from the farms. Our herbal ginseng tea is rich in antioxidants and ginsenosides which revitalize your mind and body for enhanced focus, memory and energy.

Why choose American ginseng? American ginseng roots owe their nutritious treasure to the fertile and rich Wisconsin soils. Panax ginseng is loaded with anti-aging benefits, 16 different kinds of minerals, 17 kinds of amino acids, polysaccharides and vitamins. No wonder it is known as the golden standard among ginsengs!

Get the real thing: We only grow and sell Wisconsin ginseng. On the back of every package you'll see two coded symbols. To verify that your purchase is authentic Baumann Wisconsin-grown American ginseng, simply scan the QR code with your smartphone.

Wisconsin’s largest producer of American ginseng: The Baumann family is the largest grower of ginseng in central Wisconsin and our saga dates way back since 1978. Our farms have the fertile, glaciated nutrient-rich soils, climate, growing experience & technology to produce the finest Wisconsin-grown ginseng for your consumption.

I really wanted to like green tea for the widely reported health benefits but found all green tea to be flavorless and a little bitter (especially if brewed too long, which I always seem to do). Another very annoying thing about a lot of green teas I tried is that the teabag ruptures, ruining the tea. Someone told me about this Yamamotoyama Sencha green tea and I finally found my green tea! It has a pale green color and a very pleasant mild herbal/flower flavor. Even when I brew it too long it doesn't seem to get very bitter. The sturdy pyramid teabag is sturdy but also biodegradable, which I like since I compost all vegetable matter. Matcha Apple Green Tea is a Yamamotoyama proprietary blend of leaves harvested from our very own tea gardens that blends, deep-steamed Sencha leaves with crisp, sweet apple flavor and subtle notes of rose petal.

bullets: VIBRANT FLAVOR PROFILE: Experience a delightful twist on traditional green tea with a tart and tangy flavor. This sour green apple tea offers a unique blend of invigorating green tea with the sharpness of tart apple, creating a refreshingly bold taste that can be enjoyed both hot or iced. Ideal for those seeking a medium-caffeinated tea with a distinct flavor, perfect for any time of day.

PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF INGREDIENTS: Our expertly crafted loose leaf tea blend features a selection of high-quality ingredients, including white hibiscus, lemongrass, and sweet blackberry leaves, all enhanced by the bright flavors of pineapple and marigold. The natural flavors combined with these whole ingredients ensure a fresh, aromatic brew every time, making it a tea experience that's as delicious as it is wholesome.

REFILLABLE TIN FOR TEA LOVERS: Our refillable tin keeps your tea fresh and aromatic for longer, ensuring every cup tastes as vibrant as the first. PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF INGREDIENTS: Our expertly crafted loose leaf tea blend features a selection of excellent quality ingredients, including white hibiscus, green tea, lemongrass, and sweet blackberry leaves, all enhanced by the bright flavors of pineapple, apple and marigold. The natural flavors combined with these whole ingredients ensure a fresh, aromatic brew every time, making it a tea experience that's as delicious as it is wholesome.

RESEALABLE POUCH FOR TEA LOVERS: Our resealable pouch keeps your tea fresh and aromatic for longer, ensuring every cup tastes as vibrant as the first. The packaging is designed for convenience, allowing you to easily scoop and brew your tea without the hassle. Each pouch provides 20-25 cups, making it an ideal choice for both daily enjoyment and special occasions.

SIMPLE BREWING INSTRUCTIONS: Brewing this flavorful green tea is easy and quick. Scoop 1.5 teaspoons of the loose leaf blend for every 8 oz of water, then pour water heated to 175°F over the tea. Allow it to steep for just 1-3 minutes to unlock the full range of flavors.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

bullets: DAILY ASSAM BLACK TEA - Elevate your mornings with our Daily Assam Black Tea. Crafted by our master blender, this blend features premium whole leaf black tea harvested during the summer season in Assam. It offers a rich and malty flavor profile. With a high caffeine content, it's the perfect choice to kickstart your day. Whether you prefer it pure or with milk, this versatile tea adapts to your taste. Make it a part of your daily ritual and experience the bold essence of Assam.

DIRECTLY SOURCED FROM PREMIUM PLANTATIONS - Experience the finest Whole Loose Leaf Tea, sourced from premium Indian plantations. Vacuum-sealed and packed within 24-72 hours of harvesting, it offers garden-fresh aroma and taste. Savour 100% pure tea, packed in a 3-layered moisture-resistant resealable bag for lasting freshness. Preparation: 2g of loose leaf | 200 ml water at 100° C | 3 - 5 mins

A BRAND WITH A BILLION DREAMS - VAHDAM India is one of India's largest digitally native, global brands, shipping to over 3 million customers across 130+ countries. With an aim to bring India's finest Teas, Brew Ware, Spices & Herbs to consumers across the world under a home-grown, sustainable label with a strong commitment to people and planet.

ETHICAL, DIRECT & FAIR-TRADE - Our innovative supply chain model ensures that you get the freshest cup of tea and our farmers get a better price for their produce. 1% of our revenue is redirected towards the education of our tea growers' children with our social initiative, Teach Me, simply wish to honour this aspiration?.

WE CARE FOR PEOPLE & PLANET - We are now a proudly carbon-neutral & a plastic-neutral brand. We measure our overall carbon & plastic footprint & offset it via our investments in environment sustainability initiatives in India.

important_information.Safety Information: Contains high caffeine.
important_information.Directions: Preparation Instructions - Take 1 teaspoon tea leaves. About 2 grams of leaves is ideal for a black tea preparation. Pour freshly boiled water over the tea leaves. Steep for 3-5 minutes depending on your taste. Strain the leaves out & enjoy. Best consumed without or with very little milk. A sweetener like sugar or honey can be added as per taste.

item_details.Flavor: (342) Quality(261) Value for money(163) Strength(117) Texture(59) Color(48) Milk compatibility(39) Aroma(41) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  SDH 5.0 out of 5 stars  Good quality "comfort" tea, evokes early memories of enjoying tea, low price Reviewed in the United States on August 24, 2020 Size: 32 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase When I first learned about CTC, or the cut-tear-curl method of processing tea, it sounded downright destructive. "CTC must produce an inferior grade of tea," I thought. This Tea India purchase proved me wrong. Not only is this a big package of tea, which can easily supply one person for 10 months or more, but it tastes great and is sold at a bargain price. I've been buying large amounts of exotic teas from overseas for a decade or more, so I consider my tea standards to be rather high. I am very pleasantly surprised by this tea. I'm glad I have the 2 pounds (and dwindling) of it in a jar in my cabinet, available whenever I need some nice, fast, tasty black tea. Despite the fine, almost powdery texture, I think it will retain its flavor for a year or more. "Fast" is certainly applicable to this tea and is one of its virtues. The fine granularity of leaf produced by CTC makes it possible to have a rich, dark cup of black tea after steeping for a mere minute or two. Don't use too much tea (it's concentrated) or steep it much longer than 2-3 minutes, or it may get too strong and bitter. Nonetheless, these features make for convenient brewing--Just steep for a few seconds, and pour! I find the flavor to be very comforting. It brings me back to my early memories of drinking Lipton or Tetley tea, the kinds I grew up drinking as a kid. But that doesn't mean it has a mundane or supermarket taste. It's very rich and full bodied. It calls to mind a warm and cozy kitchen. It has a smooth taste when prepared right, which is not difficult. At first I thought it might be too strong a tea to enjoy without milk, but later I accidentally drank a cup of cold Tea India tea with no milk, and it was great! I do think this tea pairs perfectly with milk, however. It's not labeled organic, but it certainly tastes clean and natural. Regarding the question of whether the tea has a "malty" taste, associated with its assamica pedigree, I'd say, yes, it does have a mild malty taste, and that contributes somewhat to the comforting character of the drink. I continue to buy more exotic and expensive teas while enjoying this one at the same time. I like to maintain a collection of teas, so I'm happy I bought this product and would do it again. Reviewed in the United States on May 7, 2025 Size: 32 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase A purchase inspired from my late night binge watching of a British TV miniseries. As an American, I know very little about drinking tea. Who better to take direction than from that of our British cousins in the U.K.? So, I was watching the "Slow Horses" miniseries on Amazon Prime, a show about a dysfunctional team of MI5 agents and their obnoxious boss, played by Gary Oldman. When the show came to a scene where a character offered to brew her guest a spot of late night TEA, she asked him to pick his choice of "Builder's" or "Assam" to which he enthusiastically replied "Assam!" She looked inside her canister and said "Sorry, (I'm) all out of Assam, you'll have to settle for Builder's. Suddenly, I, too, was craving a hot spot of tea! But what of this "Builder's" and the preferred "Assam" of which they speak? I knew only of Lipton & Nestea. Immediately, I'm on my Amazon Prime account searching for "Assam Tea". My search led me directly to this magnificent find, which I ordered & received in mere days. All I can say is "WOW!" This tea is a game-changer for me and what I knew about tea! First off, the bag was HUGE, much larger than anticipated! (using my FoodSaver vacuum sealer, I subdivided this enormous bag into roughly ten smaller packets of various sizes, I stored some and shared the others with my family members. My sister was most enthusiastic of all, she loves this tea every bit as much as I do. She commented "great tasting, and this tea is VERY STRONG!" I said, "Well that just means you USE LESS!" as the strength is a direct result of your measure. She said she had been re-brewing the tea leaves for a second cup, I said "Well don't do THAT, just use a smaller measure!" Overall, I think you'll love the flavor and sheer value of this Assam Tea, a real game changer for this American tea drinker! bullets: CTC TEA- CTC stands for Crush Tear Curl. The black tea leaves in the process of passing through several rollers are transformed into small and round pellets. These pellets create a delicious blend of flavors for the perfect cup of chai tea, something that has been enjoyed in the Indian household for years. Indulge in 2lbs of our premium loose black tea.

FINEST ASSORTMENT LOOSE LEAF TEA- Our original loose leaf tea for an authentic cup of chai is made with 100% natural ingredients. Discover a delicious blend of premium, strong, and full-bodied Assam tea in every sip.

A FLAVORSOME EXPERIENCE: Our premium black tea creates a delightful experience that lets you witness the aroma of the tea hills of Assam, made possible by blending the loose leaf black tea to perfection so you get a delicious cup of hot tea every time.

PERFECT CUP OF TEA IN MINUTES: Place our Tea India CTC Assam Loose Black Tea into a tea infuser. Insert the infuser into a cup of hot water and let steep for 3-4 minutes. For an added bonus, mix in a dash of milk. Sip and enjoy.

BORN IN INDIA, MADE IN AMERICAS: Expand your tea horizons and indulge in a delicious cup of our loose leaf black tea, and create a unique experience every time you brew a new cup of black tea. We've devoted ourselves to producing the highest quality black tea for you and your family to love.

bullets: Organic Barley Tea: Our organic barley tea offers a refreshing and flavorful beverage that is both delicious and nutritious. Made from the finest quality barley, this tea is a natural source of vitamins and minerals, making it a healthy choice for any time of the day.

High-Quality Ingredients: Made with organic roasted barley, our barley tea is a pure and flavorful beverage, free from additives and artificial ingredients. Sourced sustainably and gluten-free, it offers a wholesome and satisfying drink for your enjoyment

Quality Assurance: Our organic barley tea is meticulously managed and controlled under the strict standards of USDA and CCOF Organic Certified. This certification ensures that our product meets the highest quality and organic integrity, providing you with a beverage you can trust.

Instructions for Perfect Barley Tea: To enjoy a delicious cup of barley tea, simply add approximately 3 tablespoons (7.2g) of our roasted barley to 10 cups (1 gallon) of boiling water. Allow it to boil for an additional 5-7 minutes over medium heat. You can adjust the brewing time according to your preference for a stronger or milder flavor. Once brewed, savor your tea hot or let it cool for a refreshing cold beverage.

Our Story: McCabe Organic takes pride in offering a wide range of premium organic products,all sourced from Southern California. Committed to quality management, we adhere to the rigorous standards of USDA and CCOF Organic certifications. Our journey is rooted in a passion for promoting organic choices and supporting a healthier lifestyle for our valued customers.

bullets: Herbal Tea For Women’s Health : Ginger-Date Tea has been known for “Women’s Tea” for thousands of years, traditionally used for daily cycle support, menstrual cramps and during postpartum to Women’s all stages of life, Ginger offers comforting warmth ,Jujube & Goji berry,Longan provides natural, nourishing sweetness for hormone balance, traditionally used for breastfeeding & lactation

Sourced from Renowned Origins & Gently Processed : We use only pure, natural ingredients: hand-picked Yunnan ginger, Ningxia goji berries, Fujian longan, and Shandong red dates. Using low-temperature drying, we carefully preserve the integrity and rich flavors of these precious herbs. This tea is caffeine-free and contains no GMOs, additives, or artificial ingredients.

A Moment of Comfort for Any Time : *Morning Ritual: Let the natural, spicy warmth of ginger help you start your day feeling centered. *Afternoon Energy: The sweet & spicy ,fruity notes of ginger and jujube(red dates) for a natural lift, *Evening Unwind: Goji berry,longan and jujube dates create a perfect, calming drink for your bedtime routine. *Thoughtful Gift: it's an ideal gift for mothers or anyone prioritizing self-care

Convenient & Enjoyable Daily Ritual : Each resealable package contains 20 individually wrapped bags for freshness and convenience. Enjoy a soothing cup at home, work, or on the go.Simmered ginger and jujube chicken soup is also a good choice

Heritage & Quality You Can Trust : This herbal tea formula is inspired by centuries-old TCM wisdom, including teachings from historical texts like the 《Compendium of Materia Medica》. It is meticulously produced in certified facility, ensuring the highest standards of quality and consistency in every bag

A Deliciously Soothing & Complex Brew : Experience a rich, balanced flavor profile where the spicy notes of ginger meet the sweet, fruity richness of goji, longan, and red dates. Naturally caffeine-free, it's your go-to drink for a comforting, cozy, and mindful moment anytime.

important_information.Safety Information: Keep out of reach of children. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant or have any medical conditions. Ingredients Ginger. Goji berry (Wolfberry). Red date. Longan
