bullets: Herbal: Taste the luscious berry flavors with the distinctive 'zing' of tart and tangy hibiscus, this wonderfully balanced brew has a complex berry flavor that is great hot or iced.
Thoughtful Sourcing: Most of our herbs, botanicals, teas, and fruits are purchased directly from farmers around the world.
Quality Ingredients: We blend our teas from the finest ingredients, with no artificial flavors or colors.
Minimal Packaging: We use tea bags without strings, tags, or staples to divert waste from landfills. Plus, we print on 100% recycled paperboard (35% post-consumer content).
Your Perfect Cup: Steep the tea bag in hot water for 4-6 minutes and remove the bag for comforting hot tea. Use the same process over 2 tea bags and serve over ice for a refreshing glass of iced tea.

bullets: Wholesome Blend of Natural Ingredients：Our Jujube Ginger Tea is a carefully crafted infusion featuring the jujubes, ginger, and goji berries. The plump jujubes bring a naturally sweet, while the ginger adds a spicy, zesty kick. The vibrant goji berries contribute their unique, tangy - sweet flavor, creating a harmonious combination of natural goodness in every cup

Rich, Comforting Flavor：Prepare to be delighted by the rich and comforting taste of our Jujube Ginger Tea. The sweetness of the jujubes and goji berries beautifully balances the warmth of the ginger. The initial sip offers a burst of ginger's spiciness, which gradually gives way to the sweet undertones of the fruits, leaving a pleasant and lingering aftertaste that warms you from the inside out

Versatile for All Occasions：This tea is perfect for any time of the day. Enjoy it in the morning to gently wake up your senses and start your day on a positive note. It also makes for an excellent mid - afternoon pick - me - up, providing a natural energy boost. In the evening, savor it as a relaxing beverage to unwind after a long day. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on - the - go, our Jujube Ginger Tea is a convenient and satisfying choice

Simple Preparation：Brewing our Jujube Ginger Tea is incredibly easy. Simply place one tea bag in a cup and pour 8 - 10 ounces of freshly boiled water over it. Let it steep for 3 - 5 minutes, depending on how strong you like your tea. For an extra - rich flavor, you can even let it steep a bit longer. You can enjoy it plain, or add a touch of honey or lemon to customize the taste according to your preference

Proper Storage for Optimal Quality：To ensure the best quality and flavor of our Jujube Ginger Tea, store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep the tea bags in their original, tightly - sealed packaging when not in use. This helps maintain the freshness of the ingredients, ensuring that each cup you make is as delicious and aromatic as the first, allowing you to enjoy the full benefits of this wonderful blend over an extended period

bullets: DISCOVER THE RICH FLAVOR OF JAPANESE GENMAICHA WITH MATCHA – Genmaicha with Matcha is a delightful Genmaicha Japanese Tea blend composed of sencha green tea, roasted rice, and premium matcha powder from Kyushu. This Japanese rice tea offers a harmonious fusion of green tea’s refreshing astringency and the warm, nutty essence of toasted rice. With every sip, enjoy the gentle bitterness of green tea, the roasted aroma of brown rice, and the vibrant green hue of matcha—coming together to create a perfectly balanced genmaicha tea.

EXPERTLY CRAFTED GENMAICHA TEA BAGS FROM JAPAN – Our genmaicha is meticulously crafted using carefully selected sencha loose leaf tea and first-harvest matcha from Kyushu. Expertly blended with Japanese roasted rice, this rice tea is manufactured in a respected factory in Japan that holds ISO 9001 certification, ensuring strict international quality standards. The result is a beautifully blended, delicious Japanese genmaicha green tea with roasted rice in a convenient tea bag, made with care and precision from start to finish.

NATURALLY LOW CAFFEINE JAPANESE GREEN TEA- Remarkably, roasted rice and roasted tea contains low caffeine content. While Genmaicha possesses a modest amount of caffeine due to its green tea component, the overall caffeine content of these genmaicha tea bags with roasted rice remains reletively low. Japanese tea Genmaicha aromatic, calming, and roasted aromas not only entices the senses, but also aids in relaxation, stress reduction, and improved sleep quality. If you are looking for an alternative low caffeine tea, which is a Japanese classic and with unique and delicious flavors in a convient tea bag, this is the tea for you!

A WELLNESS-FRIENDLY JAPANESE RICE TEA FOR ALL AGES - Our Genmaicha Tea With Matcha contributes to your healthy lifestyle, as it is enriched with vitamins, minerals, and dietary fibers. Genmaicha is suitable for all ages, from children to the elderly, making it ideal and thoughtful gift option.

VERSATILE BREWING: ENJOY GENMAICHA HOT OR COLD- Embrace Genmaicha tea with matcha through the two quintessential methods: hot brewing and cold brewing. Both brewing methods allow you to savor the Genmaicha roasted, nutty aroma, and the deep, invigorating tastes, naturally showcasing the unique essence of Genmaicha Green Tea with Matcha

This winter, enjoy premium Japanese specialty foods and teas from Yamasan Kyoto Uji—perfect as gifts for others, a self-indulgent treat, or for creating a festive Christmas feast to share with family and friends.

bullets: Organic Brown Rice Tea: Our organic brown rice tea offers a soothing and comforting beverage that is rich in nutrients, making it a perfect choice for relaxation and well-being.

Benefits of brown rice tea: Indulge in the goodness of brown rice with our brown rice tea, a grain tea that offers all the benefits of brown rice without any side effects. Enjoy its savory taste as a delightful bonus to your daily hydration routine.

Quality Assurance: Our organic brown rice tea is meticulously managed and controlled under the strict standards of USDA and CCOF Organic Certified. This certification ensures that our product meets the highest quality and organic integrity, providing you with a beverage you can trust.

Instructions to Use: Create a satisfying cup of brown rice tea by adding approximately 3 tablespoons (7.2g) of roasted brown rice to 10 cups (1 gallon) of boiling water. Let it simmer for 5-7 minutes on medium heat, and savor the delightful aroma and flavor of this versatile tea, whether enjoyed hot or cold.

Our Story: McCabe Organic takes pride in offering a wide range of premium organic products,all sourced from Southern California. item_details.Flavor: (63) Taste(42) Value for money(18) Mellowness(9) Aroma(8) Caffeine content(7) Strength(10) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Imagination Is Intelligence 5.0 out of 5 stars  A delicious tea that you need to try! Reviewed in the United States on August 25, 2024 Verified Purchase I love this tea it has a unique toasty flavor. It's one of my favorites. It has enough caffeine in it to give me a good clean energy as well. I translated the text on the box and it says to steep for 3-4 minutes. I typically steep for about 5 minutes because I like mine a little stronger. (It doesn't get bitter like black tea) When I was a kid my mother used to take us to this amazing Chinese restaurant. She met the owners and they became friends. They would let us stay till after closing while they chopped vegetables up for the next day. One day my mom asked the owner what was the delicious tea they served. The owner told her it was brown rice green tea. Now, about two decades later I can enjoy this tea again! I highly recommend it and for the price this box will last you a long time! 3 people found this helpful Helpful Report  JSmith 5.0 out of 5 stars  High in L-Theanine Reviewed in the United States on July 9, 2020 Verified Purchase I have been trying to temper or at least notice my caffeine intake. I have moderate insomnia and crave a pot of coffee to rev me up upon waking to help me “eat the frog” of my day. I’m a busy attorney by trade. Litigation and project development. Busy stuff needing real focus. Often coffee leaves me jittery, though, and sometimes a bit anxious or on-edge, rather than focused. I did research and learned that all tea has a compound or chemical called L-Theanine that is naturally occurring and helps the mind calm and focus. But not all teas are created equally, and green tea has a stronger L-Theanine to Caffeine ratio, and there was actually a university laboratory study showing THIS particular strain of green tea from Korea to have the greatest level of L-Theanine to Caffeine ratio. I found the study online! I love brown rice tea also, I find it earthy and grounding and delicious as I know from eating in Japanese restaurants and later finding a box of brown rice green tea in Costco. Years ago! So I was very happy to find this special strain of green tea on amazon and remembering that I adored the flavor of brown rice tea, I thought the universe must be supporting me in this ... ;) and I ordered it. I’m really happy that I did. It is a nice addition to my tea collection and I’ve vowed to learn to drink it in place of coffee, or at least increase my habit of drinking this delicious tea for my mental health/focus. I may need several bags or cups to get the caffeine I desire, but I know I’ll also be getting the compound that will help me focus also, so that I can “eat that frog” and not be too, too on edge. I’m also hopeful that the minor caffeine reduction that comes from replacing some of my coffee with this tea may actually help me overcome my moderate insomnia, and I also signed up for an online insomnia support program through my health insurance to help with this. So overall I am sharing to say that I think this tea is a wonderful tool, a healthy tool, for those of us who are aiming to maximize our energy, focus, productivity and yes overall health. And I wanted to point out that I learned that this particular strain has more L-Theanine in it which is a chemical known to help with focus. For example, I learned that it helps with ADHD. bullets: KOREAN BROWN RICE GREEN TEA – Brown rice green tea is a natural blend tea drink you can enjoy anytime of day. The all-natural earthy brew created from each tea bag is smooth, aromatic, flavorful, and easy to drink. It features the perfect harmony and balance of flavor that is great to drink as is or along with any meals. We hope every sip brings a refreshing, soothing sense of calm and focus to your day. 100 teabags per pack is a great value for you to enjoy multiple cups of tea with one order.

HIGH QUALITY HEALTH DRINK – Support good health with this herbal tea made of only brown rice and green tea. Green Tea contains less caffeine than coffee and is packed with L-Theanine, an amino acid which helps promote focus, concentration, and relaxation. Dongsuh is committed to providing the highest quality teas to promote positive tea culture around the world. We craft traditional tea blends in state of the art facilities for everyone to experience the benefits of teatime.

MILD, EARTHY FLAVOR – Take a quiet morning or afternoon tea break with this authentic Korean tea! Dongsuh Brown Rice Green Tea is acclaimed across Asia and internationally for its roasted rice aroma and light, pleasant flavor. This classic favorite tea drink has a lovely light gold color and earthy mellow taste you’ll love. Tasteful to enjoy anytime, anywhere. A delicate, nutty brew is an invigorating traditional beverage that is perfect for moments of focus, reflection, and self-care.

KICK THE COFFEE HABIT – The unique toasty aroma of green tea with roasted rice tea is an excellent substitute for your morning cup of Joe. Enjoy the ritual of me-time with a delicious hot beverage without the coffee jitters and afternoon crash. Green Tea is a gentle pick-me-up that can help improve your mood and is better for your health. It’s a great alternative to coffee that you can drink in the mornings, afternoons, and late into the evening. Share this tasty tea with friends and family!

EASY TO PREPARE TEA BAGS – Enjoy a hot or cold cup of tea! For hot tea, steep 1 tea bag in hot water for 10 minutes. For iced tea, steep one tea bag in a pitcher of cold water in the refrigerator for at least 1 hour or more. Easily take a packet with you on-the-go to work or school and prepare in minutes. The single serving teabags are travel-friendly and perfect for office break rooms, camping trips, and traveling on vacation. Give this toasty tea drink a try – you are sure to love it!

important_information.Safety Information: Store in a cool, dry place away from sunlight and humidity.
important_information.Directions: Place one tea bag in a cup, add hot water, and allow it to steep for an appropriate time to taste.

Suggested use: In a cup add 1 teaspoon of root, pour boiling water, brew covered for about 8-10 minutes, strain it and drink it every evening. Enjoy!.

SPIRITUAL BENEFITS: Purification and Cleansing: Similar to its physical effects, buckthorn bark is spiritually linked to clearing out negative energy, old emotional baggage, and spiritual blockages. It helps cleanse the aura and environment of stagnant or harmful influences.

Transformation and Renewal: Buckthorn bark supports spiritual renewal and personal transformation, helping individuals release old patterns and embrace new beginnings. It aids in the process of shedding what no longer serves you.

Spiritual Cleansing Ritual: Prepare a cleansing bath by steeping buckthorn bark in hot water to create a tea. Add this tea to your bathwater and soak with the intention of releasing negativity, toxic emotions, or spiritual blockages. Visualize the water washing away all that needs to be cleansed.

Renewal and Transformation Ritual: Write down things you want to release—such as old habits, emotional baggage, or negative patterns—on a piece of paper. Sprinkle buckthorn bark over the paper and safely burn it while focusing on releasing these energies. As the paper burns, visualize a fresh start and transformation taking place.

bullets: NATURALLY SWEET WITH A HINT OF HONEY: Savor the smooth, lightly floral taste of our premium oolong, kissed with a subtle honeyed note. A deliciously mellow brew that feels like a treat. No sweeteners needed.

SUPPORTS NATURAL CORTISOL BALANCE & HORMONE HEALTH: Our 4500ft high-altitude grown oolong tea helps promote calm and balance by supporting cortisol levels. The perfect daily ritual to reduce stress and bring your body back to equilibrium.

FARMED AT HIGH ALTITUDE FOR EXCEPTIONAL FLAVOR & POTENCY: Harvested from hand picked, pristine, elevated tea gardens, our whole leaf oolong is naturally rich in antioxidants and polyphenols, delivering a smooth, powerful brew with unmatched purity. Unlike tea dust, which can be bitter and less potent, whole leaves preserve the full flavor and purity of the tea.

THE FLAT TUMMY TEA THAT ACTUALLY WORKS: Gently support digestion and bloat reduction with every cup. This oolong tea is a favorite among those seeking a clean, caffeine-powered tea for metabolism and weight support.

NATURE'S THROAT COAT WITH EVERY SIP: Soothing and smooth, this organic oolong tea coats your throat with a comforting warmth. Making it an excellent choice for wellness routines, especially during seasonal changes.
NO FILLERS, NO ADDITIVES – JUST PURE OOLONG: Made from 100% whole leaf, organic oolong. No blends, no sugar, no artificial anything. Just the good stuff, packed into 20 convenient tea bags (4g each).
CALMING TEA FOR ANXIETY & STRESS: Whether you're starting your day or winding down, this calming tea helps you relax without feeling drowsy. Natural way to support mood, focus, and peace of mind.

bullets: Premium Quality Oolong Tea: Tian Hu Shan oolong tea is carefully crafted from the finest leaves and processed using strict standards from planting to packaging. With our own tea mountain and factory in Fujian China, you can enjoy this tea with confidence.

Manually picked tender leaves: This oolong tea is made using only the freshest and most tender leaves, hand-picked by skilled farmers. Each leaf is carefully selected to bring out the full flavor and aroma of our tea. Perfect for cold brewing & hot siping, refreshing summer flavor.

Unique Roasted Aroma: This oolong tea with a dark brown color and full appearance, which quickly releases its aromatic flavor. The tea soup is mellow and thick, with a lasting aroma and sweet aftertaste.

Superior Growing Conditions: Our tea garden has deep soil layers, with sandy loam texture and high organic matter content in the surface layer, providing rich mineral nutrients for the growth and quality of our tea.

Tin Can Packaging: We use high-quality, resealable tin cans to perfectly protect the precious loose-leaf tea. This elegant packaging is not only a symbol of quality but also allows you to freely control the strength of each brew for a personalized tea.

bullets: Premium quality: We have our own tea mountain and factory in Fujian China, implementing strict standards at every step from planting to packaging. Manually pick the tender leaves of oolong tea, and select the best products between the choices.

Unique flavor: Roasted flavor, The color of oolong tea is dark brown and the appearance is full, which is conducive to the rapid diffusion of tea aroma. The tea soup is mellow and thick, with a lasting aroma, and feels sweet after tasting.

Superior conditions: Our tea garden has a deep soil layer, with a texture of sandy loam, a high content of orgenic matter in the surface layer, and rich mineral nutrients. It is not only suitable for the growth of tea trees, but also has excellent tea making quality.

Manually picked tender leaves: Our oolong loose leaf tea is made using only the freshest and most tender leaves, hand-picked by skilled farmers. Each leaf is carefully selected to bring out the full flavor and aroma of our tea.

Tin Can Packaging: We use high-quality, resealable tin cans to perfectly protect the precious loose-leaf tea. This elegant packaging is not only a symbol of quality but also allows you to freely control the strength of each brew for a personalized tea experience.

important_information.Safety Information: Contains high levels of caffeine. Not recommended for children, pregnant women, or those sensitive to caffeine. Ingredients oolong tea
important_information.Directions: Heat water to 195-205°F, steep 1 teaspoon of loose leaves for 3-5 minutes.

bullets: 100% Organic Loose Leaf Oolong Tea - Authentic whole-leaf oolong grown on organic farms using traditional cultivation. Never crushed, chopped, or dust-grade. You get intact leaves that unfurl beautifully in water, releasing deeper flavor, fuller body, and a richer infusion with every steep.

Cultivated & Curated Under The Expertise of Dylan Rothenberg - Founder of Wu Mountain Tea - As a current PHD candidate in Tea Cultivation in Guangzhou, China, Dylan worked directly with organic tea growers to ensure Wu Mountain Tea's oolong is cultivated using traditional methods that preserve leaf integrity and authentic character.

Smooth, Clean Flavor with Full Aroma - Expect a balanced, fresh taste with gentle floral notes, light sweetness, and zero harsh bitterness. This is a refined oolong that encourages slow sipping. Ideal for daily enjoyment, tea mindfulness, and flavor purity without additives or artificial flavoring.

Naturally Energizing & Daily Enjoyment - Oolong contains natural polyphenols and mild caffeine that provide a calm, steady lift, not an anxious caffeine spike. Perfect for early mornings, mental clarity, creative work, or replacing coffee while still enjoying a warm, comforting beverage.

Versatile for Tea Lovers Hot or Cold - Expert-selected leaves that deliver a smooth, balanced infusion whether brewed hot or cold. Their natural structure allows clean extraction, clarity of flavor, and multiple re-steeps providing more cups and more enjoyment from every session.

1-LB Resealable Value Bag for Freshness - A generous bulk size for true tea drinkers packaged in a resealable, freshness-protecting bag that keeps aroma locked in and each brew flavorful. Better value per ounce and a long-lasting supply for home, office, or ceremonial use.

important_information.Directions: Brew 1 teaspoon of loose leaves per 8 oz of water at 190°F (88°C) for 3-5 minutes. Re-steep leaves for multiple infusions.

bullets: OOLONG CHINESE TEA: Oolong tea originated in the Fujian Province of China over 1000 years ago. The tea’s partial oxidation process results in a uniquely warm and toasty taste.
PURE OOLONG TEA: Experience the unique flavor of Oolong tea, which sits between black and green tea, sharing many of the same desirable qualities.
FRESHEST TEA: Each tea bag contains pure Oolong tea enveloped and sealed for freshness, delivering the perfect cup of caffeinated tea, every time.

PREPARING YOUR TEA: After steeping your cup of Oolong tea for 3-5 minutes in boiling water, enjoy with or without milk. For a refreshing iced tea, let the brew cool before pouring it over ice. Sweeten, as desired.
SIGNATURE BLEND OF TRADITION AND INNOVATION: Twinings encourages consumers to “Drink in Life” by taking small steps towards feeling good and living well, one sip at a time.

bullets: Thoughtfully Crafted Herbal Blend, Our chrysanthemum cassia seed tea brings together cassia seeds, burdock root, goji berries, and chrysanthemum flowers in one soothing caffeine-free blend. Unlike single-herb teas that taste flat, this carefully balanced mix offers a mildly sweet, earthy flavor with no bitterness. Each tea sachet contains only natural ingredients – no artificial flavors, colors, or preservatives

Convenient Sachets for Any Lifestyle, Each box gives you 20 individual tea bags, each holding 5g (0.176 oz) of premium herbal blend. Grab one sachet for your office mug, travel thermos, or evening cup at home. No measuring, no messy loose-leaf cleanup. Compared to bulk loose-leaf teas that lose freshness quickly, our sealed sachets lock in aroma and potency until you steep

Clean Ingredients, Nothing Extra, We keep it simple: cassia seeds, burdock root, goji berries, and chrysanthemum. That's it. This herbal tea is naturally gluten-free, vegan, and contains zero added sugar, zero caffeine, and zero calories. Perfect for anyone looking for a clean, relaxing cup any time of day

Steep Hot or Cold in Minutes, Easy to prepare – just place one sachet in 8-10 oz of hot water and steep for 3-5 minutes. For iced tea, steep double strength in hot water, then pour over ice. The fine mesh sachets allow full flavor extraction without tearing or leaking. Unlike cheap tea bags that taste like paper, our sachets release the full character of chrysanthemum and cassia seeds evenly

Resealable Box for Good Storability, The box is designed to keep your remaining sachets fresh. After opening, simply close the flap and store in a cool, dry place. Each sachet stays protected from moisture and odors – so your last cup tastes as good as the first. Net weight 100g (3.53 oz) for the whole box. No need for extra canisters or clips. Enjoy a naturally soothing herbal tea whenever you need a moment to unwind

bullets: Texas-Style Iced Tea In Minutes – Brew authentic HTeaO sweet or unsweetened iced tea in just 5 minutes. Easy to prepare, it’s perfect for making large, family-size servings that bring the refreshing taste of Texas to your home, even when you're not near a store.

Delicious Coconut Black Tea - Using African black teas, HTeaO's coconut-flavored tea has normal levels of caffeine with a bold, tropical taste. Coconut flavors are custom made for this tea blend from American Suppliers.

Makes 8 Gallons Of Iced Tea – Each package includes 16 flavored tea bags, with each sachet brewing 0.5 gallon of tea. That’s a total of 8 gallons of ready-to-drink tea, offering great value and easy preparation for parties or gatherings.

Guilt-Free and Diet-Friendly – Naturally calorie-free and carb-free, this tea is a smart choice for low-carb lifestyles or anyone watching their sugar intake. Made with hand-harvested, non-GMO, gluten-free, and kosher ingredients, it lets you control the sweetness for a refreshing sip every time.

Enjoy Your Favorite Tea At Home – Since 2009, we’ve served over 20 million cups of our delicious iced tea. Now you can enjoy the same premium quality and signature HTeaO flavor at home, so you never have to miss your favorite tea again.

bullets: BLACK TEA: Black teas are fully oxidized teas and offer a rich robust strong cup. Black is by far the most popular tea in the world. In the US, it accounts for about 80% of the tea consumed

FLAVOR PROFILE: Black tea is a type of tea that is more oxidized than oolong, white and green teas. Black tea is generally stronger in flavor than other teas with notes that range from earthy, molasses, malty, vine fruit, smoky, leather, and mineral

CAFFEINE LEVEL: Black tea characteristically has the most caffeine of all the tea types. One of the reasons for this is a longer infusion time, but also due to the longer oxidation time and final firing production step
REAL LOOSE LEAF TEA IN BAGS: Loose leaf tea is a healthier purer way to drink tea, we gently breakup our loose leaf teas for use in tea bags to help retain full flavor

PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF TEA: Premium tea leaves have all their essential oils intact, so the flavor, quality and health benefits are maintained. Individually hand packed in the USA in a resealable pouch to retain freshness

TROPICAL COCONUT INFUSION: This coconut black tea combines high quality black tea leaves with natural coconut pieces and flavors, creating a soft and rich cup with luxurious coconut essence in every sip
CONVENIENT PACKAGING: Contains 20 tea bags of premium coconut black tea, individually packaged to preserve freshness and make brewing simple and convenient for daily enjoyment

important_information.Directions: Bring cold water to a boil. Add one heaping tea-spoon of tea leaves per cup. Pour over leaves, steep 3-6 minutes, and strain.

HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET. Joining 1% for The Planet in 2006 meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice. Harney & Sons was founded on a commitment to deliver customers the finest quality tea possible. This promise, made over 30 years ago, serves as the company's guiding principle. Today, Harney & Sons Tea remains family owned and managed, with three generations of Harney's preserving John's tradition of fine tea and traveling the world in search of the finest ingredients. It is not only the Harney mission to deliver quality tea products to their customers, but also to educate the world of tea history and taste. Whether through their dedicated customer service team, their published guides to tea drinking, or their two tea tasting shops, the Harney & Sons team works to pass on their passion of tea to a wide audience. From lugging heavy tea filled chests down their basement stairs, to stocking shelves at stores nationwide, Harney & Sons remains committed to delivering their customers a superior tea drinking experience.

Helpful Report  The DINK 5.0 out of 5 stars  mmmmmm Reviewed in the United States on January 31, 2025 Size: 1 Pound (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase One of my favorites from this company. They sell pretty good tea. Maybe not the best straight tea you can get, but they do a good job with most of their flavored teas like this. It somehow manages to taste more coconutty than a competitor that has chunks of real coconut in it. 2 people found this helpful Helpful Report  pulsepilot1 5.0 out of 5 stars  A delicious tea with a great coconut flavor. Reviewed in the United States on April 14, 2020 Size: 1.3 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I made a gallon with artesian RO water, tasted it hot, let it cool, and put it in a sealed container in the fridge. I didn't bother to do the math for the amount and just eyeballed it. I normally use about 7 regular teabags and triple steep them with my iced tea maker on the strong setting. Since this is loose leaf, I used a non-bleached coffee filter. I noticed that after brewing, there were actually many full tea leaves instead of just shreds. It tastes excellent hot and cold. I think it has plenty of the coconut flavor that does taste natural and I like that it is made with real coconuts. It is great with and without sweetener. I use monk fruit drops for sweetener and I think it brings out the coconut flavor a little more. It is oolong tea but it seems more like green tea but it doesn't matter to me. It is smooth and tasty. I am adding it to my spring and summer tea rotation. I pretty sure the weight is correct on the label but I would like to see the can filled to the brim because I would go through it pretty fast. I would probably pay extra for it. 2 people found this helpful Helpful Report  courtney love 5.0 out of 5 stars  So good. One person found this helpful Helpful Report  Nicole Schultz 5.0 out of 5 stars  Amazing tea Reviewed in the United States on February 11, 2024 Size: 8 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I absolutely love this tea. It has a gentle tropical flavor and nice tannin. I drink this on its own and it’s also wonderful for use in my cocktail bar. I’ve infused spirits with it and made syrups with it. All in all, you can’t beat the flavor or the quality. Helpful Report  Gail(SPC) Duve 2.0 out of 5 stars  Loose Coconut Tea - Original opinion Edited Reviewed in the United States on March 20, 2024 Size: 1.3 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase Tea smells great when you first open it. I love coconut but find you need to use a lot of it to get great coconut taste in your cup. Further, you have to break up the tea to get it all in the steeper and use most of it on just one cup of tea. It turns out to be very pricey. I have gone back to regular tea bags. I have made tea with this several times since I first got it. Big change in thoughts..... You need to use A LOT OF TEA to get decent flavor. I reduce my stars down to a a two....... but didn't want to show that in the header because it is deceiving. I doubt I will try it again. Third Edit: After looking at the photos of the folks who attached one, I know what the problem is. THEY got tea leaves. I got stems, for the most part. Product description Steve's Story Founder, CEO, and Master Tea Blender, Steve Schwartz, began his journey into the world of tea at the Ayurvedic Institute in New Mexico. His interest in Eastern medicine led him to uncover a passion for the alchemy of blending herbs and botanicals. After catching the attention of few local chefs including Wolfgang Puck, Steve officially founded the company in 2004. Today, Art of Tea is a leading purveyor of rare and unique teas, offering top-tier blends from around the world. White Coconut Creme Tea Delight your senses with our hand-blended botanicals Immerse yourself into a cup of this dreamy tropical infusion! With its light body and smooth, creamy texture, it’s no wonder our White Coconut Creme tea is a favorite of many Art of Tea customers! Our White Coconut Creme tea bags deliver a sweet and soothing balance of coconut and are great hot or as a coconut iced tea. At a Glance Our sachets are made from plant-based PLA (polylactic acid), derived from renewable plant sources. Medium Caffeine No sugar or carbs added, Kosher, Gluten-Free, Vegan Friendly Creamy, smooth, and sweet taste profile Our Process We believe in sourcing only the top 2% of all teas produced in the world. Quality is at the core of everything we do, and you'll taste it in every cup. Our Mission Our mission is to create a delicious experience and impact as many lives as we can through tea. Our Impact Whether it's through our partnerships with family-owned farms, our commitment to sachets that are made from plant-based PLA (polylactic acid), derived from renewable plant sources, or our use of recyclable packaging whenever possible, we are always striving to create a greener future. bullets: DELICIOUS EXPERIENCE – Find your new favorite with this tea sampler pack from Art of Tea! Includes a set of 12 Organic White Coconut Crème Tea sachets . A dreamy, tropical coconut white tea. White Coconut Crème tea features a gourmet light body flavored, smooth creamy vanilla texture with hints of toasted almond. A sugar free customer favorite both hot and iced with your favorite cream.

INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED - Each Art of Tea signature sachet comes individually wrapped in our signature plant-based PLA (polylactic acid), derived from renewable plant sources, pyramid tea bag sachet ready to be steeped into a perfect cup of tea. Wrapping each individual sachet allows us to ensure each bag is fresh, full of flavor, and ready to be enjoyed. Take some on the road with you or enjoy our Art of Tea signature tea box designs, perfect for an artful contribution to your kitchen counters.

CREATE A PERFECT BREW - Each tea sampler pack includes 12 individual tea sachets, enough for 12 strong cups of delicious tea! Each sachet is blended for one 8 oz cup of tea; for this White Coconut Creme blend, steep water to 175-185 degrees Fahrenheit and steep for 3 minutes.

CAFFEINE CONTENTS - This Organic White Coconut Crème Tea contains a moderate amount of caffeine, making this a perfect tea to start your day with. Goes great with breakfast or as a extra pick me up. Works as a great coffee alternative.

ADDITIVE FREE - All of Art of Tea’s blends are 100% organic or made of natural ingredients with no additives. This Organic White Coconut Crème Tea includes: Organic White Tea, Organic Safflower, Cornflowers, Organic Coconut, Natural and Artificial Flavors *Contains tree nuts (Coconut)

bullets: EXOTIC FLAVOR EXPERIENCE: Enjoy the smooth, coconut-infused oolong tea that combines the earthy richness of oolong with the creamy sweetness of coconut, creating a tropical taste sensation in every cup. This loose leaf tea offers a luxurious and refreshing flavor that transports you to a tropical paradise with each sip.

PREMIUM LOOSE LEAF INGREDIENTS: Our loose leaf tea blend features excellent quality oolong tea, complemented by the natural sweetness of pineapple, lemongrass, and roasted coconut. This carefully crafted combination not only enhances the tea's flavor but also adds a delightful aroma that elevates your senses.

RESEALABLE POUCH FOR TEA LOVERS: Our resealable pouch keeps your tea fresh and aromatic for longer, ensuring every cup tastes as vibrant as the first. The packaging is designed for convenience, allowing you to easily scoop and brew your tea without the hassle. Each pouch provides 20-25 cups, making it an ideal choice for both daily enjoyment and special occasions.

SIMPLE BREWING INSTRUCTIONS: Enjoying your favorite tea has never been simpler. For the perfect cup, just scoop 1.5 teaspoons of loose leaf tea for every 8 oz of water. Pour 195-degree water over the tea and let it steep for 3-5 minutes. Once steeped to your desired strength, remove the tea leaves, and enjoy the rich, soothing flavors.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

important_information.Safety Information: Contains caffeine. Not recommended for children or pregnant women. May contain allergens such as coconut and lemongrass. Ingredients oolong tea, pineapple (pineapple, cane sugar), lemongrass, roasted coconut (coconut, cane sugar), natural flavors

bullets: Herbal: This classic brew blends real lemons and lively lemongrass with hibiscus, which gives it its signature tangy taste and ruby-red color. It’s a bright tea that's perfect in any weather.

Reviewed in the United States on September 5, 2019 Size: 18 Count (Pack of 6)Verified Purchase This lemon ginger tea from Bigelow contains probiotics and claims to support healthy digestion. The ingredients are: Lemongrass, lemon peel, cinnamon, natural ginger, lemon flavors with other natural flavors (soy lecithin), lemon verbena, rose hips, ginger, licorice root, GanedenBC30 (bacillus coagulans GBI-30, 6086) - a copyrighted probiotic. I am not sure how probiotics work with boiled water, but Bigelow states that this probiotic is "an innovation that helps maintain a healthy balance in your digestive tract when used as part of a healthy diet". I first found this tea at Family Dollar in Maine. This is interesting in that Family Dollar only had maybe two tea options and this was the only herbal tea. I've now gotten used to having this tea everyday and although it is not very lemony, it has a rich, smooth taste especially with a little sugar (I use demerara cane sugar) added. This tea has good "mouth feel" if that makes any sense - almost a creamy texture. I just ordered this on Amazon, so now I can write a review. For some reason, Bigelow tea seems to have a number of questionable reviews. I even saw some on another site. I can honestly state that this is a real, unbiased review. If you want a real lemony flavor, go for Bigelow's I Love Lemon herbal tea. I came upon this tea by chance and now I am enjoying having some everyday. I am giving the product 4 stars out of 5 stars because I think that calling this a lemon ginger tea is misleading. It does not taste like other lemon ginger teas that I've tried. The flavors of lemon and ginger are intermingled with other flavors to create a taste unique to this tea and quite honestly, it may not be everyone's "cup of tea". It is fairly gentle on the stomach and definitely does not feel acidic too citrus-y or harsh. Happy Sipping! We used to be able to buy just the roasted rice and popped rice in a huge bag at our local Japanese market, but it's no longer sold. We searched and searched and finally found this. And as far as quality, it very good in that it has a large amount of popped rice mixed in with the roasted rice kernels. It's called tea, but technically, there isn't any real tea leaves included. Many products are sold as teas because some apparently brew the popped and roasted rice straight without actual green tea leaves, and it's considered a "tea" in the sense that it's a brewed beverage made by brewing roasted and popped rice. However, we use this in a more traditional way by adding it to green tea, to make genmaicha or green tea with roasted rice. Very delicious and satisfying. I deducted a star because it's a bit more pricey than how I used to buy the roasted and popped rice in bulk, but given that it's hard to find and the fact that a little goes a long way, it's still worth buying! bullets: NURUNGJI (SCORCHED RICE) TEA BENEFITS: Reproduces the original taste of fermented rice in a cauldron it soothes the stomach by neutralizing spicy and salty food, clears the mouth of food remnants, and promotes digestion. Enjoy this beautiful & heartwarming tea everywhere. For you and your loved one's health, every sip matters.

PERFECT BLENDING: Each tea bag contains 50% crust of overcooked rice, 25% roasted brown rice, 10% solomon's seal and 15% corn. Blended with high-quality ingredients. Enjoy the soft and authentic taste of the natural ingredients. No artificial additives and caffeine-free. Perfect alternative for water or coffee.

PREMIUM TEA BAG: 100 individually wrapped tea bags sealed for freshness! Made of premium filter paper tea bags without staples for a fresher and flavorful brew.To get the most out of every cup, place 1 Crust of Overcooked Rice Tea bag in a cup and add 100mL of hot water. SERVE HOT AND COLD: Try a cup of heart-warming soothing tea or enjoy iced tea with ice and cold water if you are dehydrated on hot days( Yes, it works well in cold water!). PRODUCT OF SOUTH KOREA: Korean grain Nurungji tea produces high quality teas suitable for Koreans taste through the preservation and development of the original taste of fermented rice. It can be eaten warm at any time due to its fragrant taste and aroma, but it is especially suitable after meals.

bullets: Delicious Flavor: Genmaicha tea has a unique taste and is a perfect blend of Genmaicha green tea and baked rice, with a strong nutty flavor and aroma, the beautiful soup color of green tea and the dual nutrition of green tea and rice.

Traditional handmade: Our genmaicha tea is made by mixing blending brown rice that has been stir fried to a high aroma with roasted green tea. Each batch is handmade to ensure authenticity and superior taste. You can enjoy the peace of mind that comes with drinking natural beverages.

Natural ingredients: Our Genmaicha tea is made from 100% natural ingredientswith no additives or artificial flavors to ensure a pure experience. It contains dietary fiber, which is good for the stomach and intestines. Incorporate this nutritious beverage into your daily routine for a delicious way to boost your vitality.

Versatile Genmaicha Tea: Genmaicha green tea with roasted rice is commonly found in Japanese restaurants and is very popular among people. Perfect for any occasion, this loose leaf Genmaicha tea can be brewed hot or cold, allowing you to enjoy its refreshing taste year-round.

Loose Leaf Form : Loose leaf format allows the whole leaves to fully unfurl in hot water, releasing a more complex, layered, and authentic flavor profile. Enjoy the freedom to customize your brew strength by easily adjusting the leaf amount to suit your personal taste.

important_information.Directions: Brewing Instructions: 1. Fill 475 ml (8oz) of water at a temperature of 170-180°F. 2. Add 1-2 teaspoons of Genmaicha tea leaves to a tea infuser or teapot. 3. Steep the tea for 2-4 minutes. 4. Enjoy 10-12 cups of tea per 1 oz of tea leaves.

item_details.Flavor: Name: Milk TeaSize: 48 Ounce (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I'm going to be the person that says this was a complete impulse purchase based upon other reviews and what it looked like from the package. I had only heard about this from friends and being in AZ, we have a TON of boba places (at least I think so). My friends rave about boba and milk tea, both available from those places. I have never purchased one because I am not a huge fan of milk nor tea, so it is quite surprising that I would go and buy a 3 pound bag of it. I figure for the price and how much I got, if I really didn't like it, I could give it to a friend to have. Well, I am happy to report I am a convert. This stuff is great! Albeit, a little sweeter than regular stuff my friends have given me to try, but I have a sweet tooth. It's a mix, so it comes in powder and you need to make it in a blender or bullet type mixer. I make mine just with milk and ice, although you can use tea as well (hence the name). It's a great on the go beverage for me and works well with my insulated cup to keep it colder (my preference). My only big gripe with the whole thing is that there is no nutritional label on the bag that is sent. There is one on the Amazon listing here, but nothing on the bag that was sent. Ingredients are listed on the bag, however, incase there are any allergens though. 4 people found this helpful Helpful Report See more reviews Back to top Get to Know Us Careers Amazon Newsletter item_details.Flavor: Name: Rose Fruity Milk TeaSize: 15 Count (Pack of 2)Verified Purchase I grew up drinking a lot of tea and it's my comfort beverage. bullets: BETTER BREW, HEALTHIER YOU: Trade your morning cup of joe for a jitter-free, smooth cup of matcha tea. Get 5g plant protein from Non-GMO soybean, perfect for a quick energy replacement or busy days on the go. Non-GMO, gluten-free, lactose-free, non-dairy, no preservatives, no artificial flavors or colors.
NOT YOUR REGULAR MILK TEA: Healthy ingredients you can feel good about. Our proprietary powdered tea is made of 3 ingredients: Matcha, soymilk powder and natural sweetener. Zero bitterness, ever.

ZENERGY: Green Matcha tea is high in both caffeine and theanine, two compounds proven to improve focus and attention. Theanine is famous for providing a smooth, calm alertness also known as “zenergy”.
QUICK & EASY: Each box contains 5 powder-to-go packets, fresh-wrapped and sealed, perfect for your daily commute. Skip the bubble tea shop and make your favorite flavored milk tea drinks at home!

AS NATURE INTENDED: Made from 100% real tea leaves, handpicked from the lush tea gardens in Taiwan where the subtropical climate and mountainous terrain gives a rich dose of sunshine, moisture and shade that plants love. Ethically sourced and consciously crafted, 3:15pm promises a memorable experience in every sip.

bullets: Wholesome Blend of Natural Ingredients：Our Jujube Ginger Tea is a carefully crafted infusion featuring the jujubes, ginger, and goji berries. The plump jujubes bring a naturally sweet, while the ginger adds a spicy, zesty kick. The vibrant goji berries contribute their unique, tangy - sweet flavor, creating a harmonious combination of natural goodness in every cup

Rich, Comforting Flavor：Prepare to be delighted by the rich and comforting taste of our Jujube Ginger Tea. The sweetness of the jujubes and goji berries beautifully balances the warmth of the ginger. The initial sip offers a burst of ginger's spiciness, which gradually gives way to the sweet undertones of the fruits, leaving a pleasant and lingering aftertaste that warms you from the inside out

Versatile for All Occasions：This tea is perfect for any time of the day. Enjoy it in the morning to gently wake up your senses and start your day on a positive note. It also makes for an excellent mid - afternoon pick - me - up, providing a natural energy boost. In the evening, savor it as a relaxing beverage to unwind after a long day. Whether you're at home, in the office, or on - the - go, our Jujube Ginger Tea is a convenient and satisfying choice

Simple Preparation：Brewing our Jujube Ginger Tea is incredibly easy. Simply place one tea bag in a cup and pour 8 - 10 ounces of freshly boiled water over it. Let it steep for 3 - 5 minutes, depending on how strong you like your tea. For an extra - rich flavor, you can even let it steep a bit longer. You can enjoy it plain, or add a touch of honey or lemon to customize the taste according to your preference

Proper Storage for Optimal Quality：To ensure the best quality and flavor of our Jujube Ginger Tea, store it in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight. Keep the tea bags in their original, tightly - sealed packaging when not in use. This helps maintain the freshness of the ingredients, ensuring that each cup you make is as delicious and aromatic as the first, allowing you to enjoy the full benefits of this wonderful blend over an extended period

bullets: All - Natural, Premium Ingredients: Our Jujube Ginger Tea is made from a blend of high - quality, all - natural ingredients. The plump jujubes are carefully selected for their sweetness and nutritional value, while the ginger adds a zesty, spicy kick. The goji berries, known for their antioxidant - rich profile, complete this wonderful combination. Each ingredient is sourced with care to ensure you get the purest and most flavorful tea

Rich and Balanced Flavor: The flavor of our Jujube Ginger Tea is a perfect balance of spiciness, sweetness, and tanginess. The initial burst of ginger spiciness gives way to the sweet, honey - like taste of jujubes, with the goji berries adding a subtle tang that rounds out the flavor profile. It's a well - crafted blend that provides a rich and satisfying taste experience with every sip

Convenient Tea - Bag Format: We understand the importance of convenience in today's fast - paced world. That's why our Jujube Ginger Tea comes in easy - to - use tea bags. Just drop a tea bag into a cup of hot water, let it steep for 3 - 5 minutes, and your tea is ready. No need to measure loose leaves or worry about messy cleanup. It's a hassle - free way to enjoy a delicious cup of tea anytime, anywhere

Versatile for All Occasions: This tea is suitable for any time of the day and any occasion. In the morning, it can wake up your senses and provide a gentle energy boost. In the afternoon, it makes for a relaxing break from your daily routine. In the evening, the warm, comforting flavor can help you unwind. Whether you're sipping it alone, sharing it with friends, or enjoying it during a meal, our Jujube Ginger Tea is the perfect companion

Potential Health Benefits: While we make no medical claims, the combination of jujubes, ginger, and goji berries in our tea has been associated with various potential health benefits. Ginger is known for its digestive - soothing properties, jujubes may contribute to overall well - being, and goji berries are rich in antioxidants. By incorporating our Jujube Ginger Tea into your daily routine, you may be treating your body to a host of natural goodness

item_details.Flavor: (16) Quality(7) Aroma(5) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Kindle Customer 5.0 out of 5 stars  Best tasting Reviewed in the United States on April 11, 2026 Verified Purchase Wonderful flavor Helpful Report  Mandalorian 5.0 out of 5 stars  A bit pricey, but genmai rice without the tea leaves is impossible to find now Reviewed in the United States on May 27, 2024 Verified Purchase This genmai rice is a bit pricey, but it goes a long way. We used to be able to buy just the roasted rice and popped rice in a huge bag at our local Japanese market, but it's no longer sold. We searched and searched and finally found this. And as far as quality, it very good in that it has a large amount of popped rice mixed in with the roasted rice kernels. It's called tea, but technically, there isn't any real tea leaves included. Many products are sold as teas because some apparently brew the popped and roasted rice straight without actual green tea leaves, and it's considered a "tea" in the sense that it's a brewed beverage made by brewing roasted and popped rice. However, we use this in a more traditional way by adding it to green tea, to make genmaicha or green tea with roasted rice. Very delicious and satisfying. I deducted a star because it's a bit more pricey than how I used to buy the roasted and popped rice in bulk, but given that it's hard to find and the fact that a little goes a long way, it's still worth buying! We can highly recommend Senbird! 8 people found this helpful Helpful Report  santiago munoz 5.0 out of 5 stars  Quality product Reviewed in the United States on January 19, 2025 Verified Purchase This is a really quality product. bullets: Authentic Caffeine-Free Japanese Genmaicha - A deeply roasted sweet brown mochi rice tea, grown & carefully crafted in small batches from Hokkaido, Japan. Compared to typical genmaicha, this tea does not contain green tea leaves

Edible Roasted Mochi Rice - Unlike traditional genmaicha, the fully cooked mochi rice is edible as is or after brewing. Features characteristic popped rice pieces with a popcorn-like appearance from the roasting process
Premium Japanese Brown Rice Tea Caffeine-Free; Non-GMO. No sugar, no preservatives, no fillers, no chemicals, and no pesticides. Tested for radiation and metals to ensure purity
Excellent Tea for Any Time from Mornings to Evenings - Premium Caffeine-Free Herbal Tea that's rich in nutrients. Naturally vegan & gluten free

Roasted Brown Rice Tea - This Genmaicha is made of award-winning roasted sweet brown mochi rice. Has a pleasant, bold rice aroma and subtle nutty sweet taste. Can be enjoyed hot or cold. The toasted rice is edible as is or after brewing

Sustainable Tea Drinking - Refillable Airtight Tea Tins minimize packaging waste. Locks out moisture & light, preserving tea freshness. Refill your tins with our Refill Pack. Proud member of 1% for the Planet

important_information.Directions: To prepare, boil water and steep the tea leaves for a few minutes before straining. Can be enjoyed hot or cold.

bullets: ⭐This tea is crafted according to traditional recipes, with a scientific ratio of ingredients including brown rice, orange peel, and ginger. The raw materials are of high quality, fresh, and carefully selected, ensuring visible quality. They come in independent packaging, making it convenient to brew anytime, saving you time and effort.
⭐The tea soup emits a pure herbal aroma. When you take a sip, it tastes mellow, with a subtle hint of sweetness that lingers on the palate, offering a unique and pleasant taste experience.

⭐The dry tea leaves showcase a clear texture and uniform size. They are dried while still fresh, and a special process is employed to retain the moisture of each herb. This ensures that the tea maintains its quality and flavor over time.Each type of herbal tea is processed into a dry form, preserving its characteristic aroma. When brewed, the tea leaves unfurl completely, maintaining their color. Moreover, they can be infused more than three times, allowing you to enjoy the rich flavor of the tea multiple times.

⭐Ginger rice tea has a unique taste. Its aroma is rich in layers, with the faint cereal fragrance of brown rice, the distinct pungent aroma of ginger, and the gentle and long-lasting citrus and aged fragrance of tangerine peel, all blending together. The taste is rich and varied. The brewed brown rice makes the tea soup mellow and thick, ginger brings a mild pungent stimulation, and tangerine peel has a sweet and sour aftertaste, all interweaving with each other. The overall taste is a warm, mellow, and multi-layered experience. When it enters the mouth, the mellow taste of brown rice and the pungency of ginger blend together.
⭐️Each tea bag weighs 5g, and the total weight is 8.81oz (2150g). You will receive 50 tea bags. The code printed on the box indicates the production date, and it has a shelf life of 18 months. ﻿

bullets: GINGER + HONEY. Prince of Peace brings you all the natural, stomach-soothing benefits of ginger and honey in our special proprietary blend of Instant American Ginseng Ginger Honey Crystals. item_details.Flavor: (307) Taste(209) Aroma(58) Relaxing(29) Honey content(16) Texture(16) Value for money(53) Strength(17) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Renee 5.0 out of 5 stars  Doesn’t taste very “green” but it is ridiculously delicious Reviewed in the United States on August 27, 2024 Size: 50 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I’m a lifelong fan of green tea. I drink it 1-2x a day, unsweetened and steeped overlong for the added bitterness. I tend to stick with plain green teas as my go to but decided to treat myself, as I do enjoy honey in herbal and black teas, and the concept of steeping honey flavor versus adding honey was novel enough for me to try. OH MY GOSH THIS TEA SMELLS INCREDIBLE was my very first thought after opening the tin. I seriously huffed it for at least a minute. I set my kettle to 190°F for a first try (green tea typically likes a cooler temp, ~170°, but added herbs and flavors need a little higher temp to steep effectively) and this is the sweet spot for me. I tried 200° but it definitely scalded the green tea and ruined the honey taste. The flavor is divine after a 5 minute brewing time (in a 14oz mug if you need the measurement) - the honey aroma fills the air and the ginseng has a sweet, pungent, floral tone. I honestly barely taste the green tea in this unless I steep it overlong, which is probably perfect if you’re someone who wants to like green tea but just can’t quite get it. The taste is sufficiently sweet if you’re someone who enjoys sweetness in moderation. I thoroughly enjoy this tea and look forward to drinking it every morning. Sometimes I will add a bag to my post-dinner cup of (currently) jasmine and green tea, and the combination of floral tones is intoxicating. What a wonderful tea, and at a humble price. What prompted me to write this review is that I am currently sick and accidentally choked on this tea this morning. It was surprisingly pleasant as it went through my sinuses and I thought, wow, I have to make sure someone else can potentially experience this someday! bullets: Daily Green Tea: A relaxing blend combines the ancient health properties of China green tea with Panax ginseng and full blossom honey. This delicious, subtly sweet tea offers a peaceful sipping experience.
Premium Tea: Clean green tea infused with honey and ginseng; relax and sip on this smooth cup of premium China green tea loaded with antioxidants and conveniently packed in a round, natural tea bag.
Steeping Instructions: Simply heat fresh, filtered water to just short of boiling. Then pour 6 oz water over tea and steep for 1-3 minutes.
Caffeine: This green tea contains a small amount of caffeine, so it is perfect to add to your daily routine to give you slight energy without the coffee-like jitters.
Gluten/Sugar-Free: The tea connoisseur's hot tea is gluten-free, sugar-free and carb free; indulge and sip away worry-free.

bullets: VIBRANT GRAPE FLAVOR & INVIGORATING BLEND: Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea offers a delightful experience with its juicy grape flavor combined with refreshing hibiscus, creating a bright, invigorating taste perfect for tea lovers of any age. This herbal tea is designed with a blend of rooibos and natural ingredients, providing a pleasant effect on both body and mind, making it an ideal choice for any time of the day.

EXQUISITE BLEND OF NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Our Grape Escape herbal tea is crafted with a carefully selected blend of natural ingredients, including grape, hibiscus, rooibos tea, sweet blackberry leaves, orange peel, cranberry slices, black currants, plum bits, blackberries, red currants, cherries, blue butterfly pea, and vanilla extract. Each ingredient contributes to a delightful tea experience.

SIMPLE BREWING INSTRUCTIONS: Brewing the perfect cup of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea is easy. Simply scoop 1.5 teaspoons of loose leaf tea for every 8 ounces of water, pour 208-degree water over the tea, and let it steep for 5-7 minutes. Remove the tea pieces and enjoy a rejuvenating cup of flavorful tea.

BREWS 20-25 CUPS: Each resealable pouch of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea provides enough loose leaf tea to brew 20-25 cups. Perfect for daily enjoyment or sharing with friends, this generous amount ensures you can indulge in the delightful grape and fruit flavors whenever you desire.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

item_details.Flavor: Name: Shine Muscat Green TeaSize: 20 Count (Pack of 1)Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) Here's a muscat green tea. For those of you unfamiliar, it's kind of related to that fairly recent candy grape. They taste somewhat of lychees, and this grape flavor is much more common for those who live in East Asia. It's pretty much what I'd expect as a sweetened, flavored green tea in a bottle. It's good, don't get me wrong, but it certainly has a price too it. Furthermore, they suggest 1 tea bag to about 5 oz of water. That's pretty much 3x bags in say, your average water bottle. It's kind of pricy. (I have been refilling my mug with water, and I can still taste/smell muscat though). Overall, I think this is definitely worth the price if you're a fan of, or miss the flavors of muscat. For other people, you probably can feel free to try, or skip. As for the taste itself, it's pretty strong muscat; they use concentrated muscat powder and you can smell it right away after opening. It uses artificial sugars, so you'll notice it pretty quickly if you aren't a fan of that. As said above, it's like a sweetened muscat green tea that you'd find at the store; by that I mean, you probably won't notice much green tea at all. But overall, really amazing tea for muscat fans. HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET. Joining 1% for The Planet in 2006 meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice. Harney & Sons was founded on a commitment to deliver customers the finest quality tea possible. This promise, made over 30 years ago, serves as the company's guiding principle. Today, Harney & Sons Tea remains family owned and managed, with three generations of Harney's preserving John's tradition of fine tea and traveling the world in search of the finest ingredients. It is not only the Harney mission to deliver quality tea products to their customers, but also to educate the world of tea history and taste. Whether through their dedicated customer service team, their published guides to tea drinking, or their two tea tasting shops, the Harney & Sons team works to pass on their passion of tea to a wide audience. From lugging heavy tea filled chests down their basement stairs, to stocking shelves at stores nationwide, Harney & Sons remains committed to delivering their customers a superior tea drinking experience.

bullets: VIBRANT GRAPE FLAVOR & INVIGORATING BLEND: Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea offers a delightful experience with its juicy grape flavor combined with refreshing hibiscus, creating a bright, invigorating taste perfect for tea lovers of any age. This herbal tea is designed with a blend of rooibos and natural ingredients, providing a pleasant effect on both body and mind, making it an ideal choice for any time of the day.

EXQUISITE BLEND OF NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Our Grape Escape herbal tea is crafted with a carefully selected blend of natural ingredients, including grape, hibiscus, rooibos tea, sweet blackberry leaves, orange peel, cranberry slices, black currants, plum bits, blackberries, red currants, cherries, blue butterfly pea, and vanilla extract. Each ingredient contributes to a delightful tea experience.

SIMPLE BREWING INSTRUCTIONS: Brewing the perfect cup of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea is easy. Simply scoop 1.5 teaspoons of loose leaf tea for every 8 ounces of water, pour 208-degree water over the tea, and let it steep for 5-7 minutes. Remove the tea pieces and enjoy a rejuvenating cup of flavorful tea.

BREWS 20-25 CUPS: Each resealable pouch of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea provides enough loose leaf tea to brew 20-25 cups. Perfect for daily enjoyment or sharing with friends, this generous amount ensures you can indulge in the delightful grape and fruit flavors whenever you desire.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

bullets: 🍇【NESTLADY GRAPE OOLONG TEA】Nestlady Grape oolong tea is made with only the finest, freshest tea leaves and all natural ingredients. Delightfully aromatic and fresh, it can be brewed multiple times.

🍇【EXPERIENCE】: This exquisite blend combines the smooth, fruity flavor of grapes with a refreshing aroma. You can drink it directly without sugar or add sugar, honey, milk, cream or ice according to your preference.
🍇【INDIVIDUAL TEA BAG】: Individually wrapped for optimal flavor, freshness and aroma, so you can enjoy it anytime, anywhere. Resealing package, ready to use.

🍇【HOW TO USE】: 1. Start with fresh, cold water. (The better the water quality, the better the tea will taste.) 2. Place the tea bag in your favorite cup or mug. 3. Bring the water to a boil and immediately pour over the tea bag. 4. Steep for 3 to 5 minutes. 5. Relax and enjoy!
🍇【SUITABLE PEOPLE】. Not recommended for pregnant women.

bullets: EXCELLENT FLAVOR AND AROMA - In association with Historic Royal Palaces, this distinctive black tea, blended with oolong tea as well, has been naturally flavoured with lemony bergamot oil and natural grapefruit flavor, for a refreshing and refined taste. While serving Royal Palace Tea in fine bone china makes for a particularly elegant cup of tea, this blend tastes sublime however you choose to enjoy it. Ingredients: Black tea, oolong tea, natural grapefruit flavour, natural bergamot oil.

GREAT PRESENT IDEA - This tea is featured in Harney's Historic Royal Palaces Collection in a traditional tin design, making it a great present idea for tea lovers. Tin contains 30 sachets. Each sachet contains enough tea to brew a 12 ounce cup of tea.

BREWING SUGGESTION - Tea is only as good as the water it is brewed in. Use filtered water as needed. Use one sachet for each cup of tea desired. Pour 212F water over the tea and infuse for 5 minutes. Remove the sachet. Relax and enjoy. Contains caffeine, 40-60 milligrams per cup.

HISTORIC ROYAL PALACES is an independent charity with a team of people who love and look after six of the most wonderful palaces in the world: Tower of London, Hampton Court Palace, the Banqueting House, Kensington Palace, Kew Palace, and Hillsborough Castle and Gardens. Creating space for spirits to stir and be stirred, HRP wants everyone to feel welcome and accepted.
HARNEY & SONS IS A PROUD MEMBER OF 1% FOR THE PLANET. Joining 1% for The Planet in 2006 meant we could directly donate one percent of our total sales to the environmental organizations of our choice.

item_details.Flavor: Name: Organic Oolong TeaSize: 100 Count (Pack of 1)Amazon Vine Customer Review of Free Product( What's this? ) As far as tea is concerned, these are somewhat decent Oolong tea. It has a balanced taste; certain bitterness coupled with a hint of sweetness aftertaste (not the highest grade though, FAR from it) which is what Oolong is supposed to be. The packaging is fairly decent albeit typical of most other Oolong tea (better than most other black/green tea though). These are completely sealed from light and air because over time they inevitably destroy the freshness and taste and I'm happy to see that they are packaged appropriately. The secret (and there are many, but one of 'em is) for determining good tea bags is to make sure they have stems within 'em because they enhanced the overall flavors (amongst many other things) and this is one of the reasons why whole tea leaves are way more expensive than tea bags. It's analogous to whole beef (i.e. steak) as opposed to ground beef (burger patty); which one do you think is more valuable and better tasting? I can't determine whether these are actually organic as with many other things although it they do have the label stating as such (Certified Organic by ECOCERT). I should also mention that Oolong is amongst one of the most expensive tea out there (and like many others it does have various different grades and/or variation in species). One a scale of 1 to 5, the usual green/black tea don't even rate on that scale where Oolong is rated the highest of 5, alone with a few other tea out there. Lastly, I'd recommend you drink these without milk or anything else; the original/traditional style is the best. These would actually taste weird to put it mildly if consumed with milk since it's not meant to. ≡ Value All things considered, these are somewhat decent organic Oolong tea as far as tea is concerned, and they come in an airtight packaging that's not exposed to light, which would help to preserve the flavor and aroma and that's great to see; however they don't stems in the bag which is a bit of a bummer. They are somewhat reasonably priced at $20 (for 180 gram) for what they provide and their overall quality. Your mileage might vary. bullets: VIBRANT GRAPE FLAVOR & INVIGORATING BLEND: Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea offers a delightful experience with its juicy grape flavor combined with refreshing hibiscus, creating a bright, invigorating taste perfect for tea lovers of any age. This herbal tea is designed with a blend of rooibos and natural ingredients, providing a pleasant effect on both body and mind, making it an ideal choice for any time of the day.

EXQUISITE BLEND OF NATURAL INGREDIENTS: Our Grape Escape herbal tea is crafted with a carefully selected blend of natural ingredients, including grape, hibiscus, rooibos tea, sweet blackberry leaves, orange peel, cranberry slices, black currants, plum bits, blackberries, red currants, cherries, blue butterfly pea, and vanilla extract. Each ingredient contributes to a delightful tea experience.

SIMPLE BREWING INSTRUCTIONS: Brewing the perfect cup of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea is easy. Simply scoop 1.5 teaspoons of loose leaf tea for every 8 ounces of water, pour 208-degree water over the tea, and let it steep for 5-7 minutes. Remove the tea pieces and enjoy a rejuvenating cup of flavorful tea.

BREWS 20-25 CUPS: Each resealable pouch of Tiesta Tea's Juicy Grape Herbal Tea provides enough loose leaf tea to brew 20-25 cups. Perfect for daily enjoyment or sharing with friends, this generous amount ensures you can indulge in the delightful grape and fruit flavors whenever you desire.

SEASONAL FLAVORS: Tiesta Tea’s loose-leaf blends are crafted to enhance your tea experience throughout the colder months. These seasonal favorites deliver a variety of flavors that are easy to brew and enjoy. Whether for personal use or shared during holiday gatherings, Tiesta Tea includes options that match different preferences and occasions.

important_information.Safety Information: Consult with your healthcare provider if you have any allergies or medical conditions. bullets: 100% ORGANIC TEA. Our 100% Organic Oolong Tea has a woody aroma and a full-bodied flavor. Oolong Tea (also known as Wu Long Tea) is from the Wuyi District of Fujian, China, which is also famous for its Rock Tea.
LOWER CAFFEINE. Unlike a cup of coffee that has approximately 100 mg–180 mg of caffeine, oolong tea contains approximately 30 mg–40 mg of caffeine.
ONLY ORGANIC. Prince of Peace’s Organic Oolong Tea is made with organic oolong tea leaves certified organic by ECOCERT SA, USA for a pure and delicious tea drinking experience!
EASY TO BREW. Simply place one tea bag in a 6 fl. oz. cup and add hot water. Let steep for 3–5 minutes before drinking. Sweeten to taste—we recommend using Prince of Peace Honey Crystals.

HIGH-QUALITY PRODUCTS. Prince of Peace was founded in 1985 with a passion for promoting a healthy lifestyle by offering you a variety of high-quality products. Established as a trusted brand in the health and wellness market, Prince of Peace has the products you need to support healthy habits.

bullets: Kumquat Lemon Passion Fruit tea ingredients are simple, only dried kumquat, passion fruit, lemon and rock sugar, without any additives. Each piece of dried kumquat and each piece of passion fruit is carefully selected to ensure that it is delicious

This fruit tea can be brewed cold or hot to meet your different drinking needs. When hot, the aroma of kumquat and the fruit flavor of passion fruit are fully released in hot water; When cold soaking, the fresh fruit smell will bring you a hint of coolness, especially suitable for hot summer

The packaging design of kumquat lemon passion fruit tea is simple, when brewing, just pour the fruit tea into the cup and add an appropriate amount of cold or hot water, wait for a few minutes, you can enjoy the delicious fruit tea. Whether at home, in the office, or on the road, this tea can provide you with a refreshing drink anytime, anywhere

Fruit tea combines dried kumquat with the flavor of passion fruit for a sweet and sour drink experience. Each bite feels fresh and vibrant, suitable for consumers of all ages, making it a good choice for your summer drink
Please soak in warm water below 60 degrees, too high water temperature will destroy the vitamin C nutrition in green orange passion fruit, and affect the taste

important_information.Directions: Soak in warm water below 60 degrees for a few minutes. For hot tea, pour the tea into a cup and add hot water. For cold tea, soak in cold water.

Taste: Our organic lemon balm tea is a stress relief supplement and is pleasantly mild with subtle citrus notes, offering a gentle way to soothe nerves and uplift the spirit.

bullets: Herbal: This classic brew blends real lemons and lively lemongrass with hibiscus, which gives it its signature tangy taste and ruby-red color. It’s a bright tea that's perfect in any weather.
Thoughtful Sourcing: Most of our herbs, botanicals, teas, and fruits are purchased directly from farmers around the world.
Quality Ingredients: We blend our teas from the finest ingredients, with no artificial flavors or colors.
Minimal Packaging: We use tea bags without strings, tags, or staples to divert waste from landfills. Plus, we print on 100% recycled paperboard (35% post-consumer content).
Your Perfect Cup: Steep the tea bag in hot water for 4-6 minutes and remove the bag for comforting hot tea. Use the same process over 2 tea bags and serve over ice for a refreshing glass of iced tea.

I'll also add my voice to what a number of other reviewers have said: You can steep and re-steep these tea leaves far more than with most teas. I have a scoop left from my previous-favorite tea. I could probably even steep it again after that, honestly, since there's no noticeable reduction in strength, but I tend to alternate flavors, and that's the point where I have enough to last until I want to alternate. I'll definitely continue to use this tea (and this company), assuming I ever need to buy more, with how long this is lasting! bullets: NATURE'S WISDOM, HANDCRAFTED HARMONY: Guided by ancient herbal wisdom, we carefully select 6 natural botanicals—including Passion Flower, Lemon Balm and Ashwagandha—from trusted farms. With modern science for precise blending, each cup is handcrafted into a gentle and effective healthy tea. Every cup reflects respect for nature and dedication to craftsmanship, inviting you to savor the soothing aroma of herbs in the midst of your busy day.

RELAXATION & MOOD SUPPORT: Do you often tense and have trouble relaxing? If so, this traditional herbal tea might be just for you! Passion Flower, known for its soothing properties, provides a sense of tranquility and relaxation. Lemon Balm supports relaxation and mood balance. We've also added the adaptogenic herb Ashwagandha, which works with Rose to help soothe and support a positive mood. Multiple herbs synergy helps you maintain a relax and positive emotional state.*

IMPROVE SLEEP QUALITY: This Passion Flower tea supports relaxation and mood while also improving sleep quality. Passion Flower helps you fall asleep faster and promotes restful sleep. Lemon Balm helps ease tension and promotes natural sleep at night. Sour Jujube Seed and Poria Cocos to help you unwind and promote deep sleep. These ingredients gently and effectively help you improve sleep quality and enjoy a restful night.*

YOU TEA RITUAL: Our tea preserves the herb’s natural mildness, delivering a pure, clean flavor profile that is gentle on the palate. Drink before bedtime. Take 1 pack for mild taste, or 2 packs for stronger taste. Pour 8 ounces of boiling water into a cup, cover, and let steep for 4-5 minutes, allowing the steam to awaken the deep aroma of the herbs.

QUALITY ASSURANCE: From the farmer's fingertips to your cup, our pursuit of quality is unwavering. We rigorously control every process, from picking and drying to blending, to present you with a pure cup of tea that embodies the essence of sunshine, terroir, and the warmth of craftsmanship. If you are not satisfied, please feel free to contact us and we will work hard to ensure you enjoy our high-quality product.

bullets: Made from real honey and citron fruit, no artificial color, no preservatives, no trans fat, no cholesterol, no caffeine

bullets: LARGE JAR HONEY CITRON TEA (2.2LB) – Big 35.27 fl oz jar for daily use and family sharing. A sweet and tangy Korean honey citron tea made with preserved citron peel and honey.
KOREAN CITRON TEA (YUJA TEA / YUZU TEA) – Also known as yuja tea or yuzu tea, this traditional Korean citrus tea base delivers a bright aroma and smooth honey sweetness.
YUZU HONEY TEA BASE FOR HOT OR ICED DRINKS – Mix 1–2 spoonfuls with hot water for a comforting honey citron tea, or add cold water and ice for a refreshing yuzu honey drink.
MULTI-PURPOSE FRUIT PRESERVE SPREAD – Use as a tea base, spread on toast, or as a topping for yogurt, desserts, and baked goods for a citrus honey twist.
CAFFEINE-FREE FOR ANYTIME ENJOYMENT – Naturally caffeine-free, making it a great fruit honey tea option for adults and kids, morning to night.

bullets: AUTHENTIC KOREAN YUJA-CHA — PURE CITRUS, NO GINGER: Classic sweet-tangy yuzu citron concentrate made with 65% real sliced yuzu and 5% pure honey - the original yuja-cha taste without any added spice. If you love bright, clean citrus flavor that the whole family can enjoy from kids to adults - this is your jar.

REAL YUZU SLICES YOU CAN SEE AND TASTE: Each jar is made with citron preserve (65% sliced yuzu), pure honey, and Vitamin C - giving you thick, satisfying citrus pulp texture in every spoonful. Made without artificial flavors or synthetic colors. Yuzu sourced from Korean farms that avoid synthetic pesticides, so the bright citrus aroma and flavor you get is the real thing - nothing artificial added.

CAFFEINE-FREE VITAMIN C COMFORT: Naturally caffeine-free and a source of Vitamin C, this cozy citrus blend is traditionally enjoyed in Korean homes on chilly days for a warming, comforting sensation — no caffeine jitters, no bitterness. Suitable for children and adults alike, any time of day.

MORE THAN TEA — A KITCHEN STAPLE: Stir 2–3 tsp into hot water for classic yuja-cha; shake with cold water and ice for a refreshing citrus ade. Spread on toast, scones, or English muffins as a honey-citrus jam. Swirl into yogurt or oatmeal. Blend into smoothies. Drizzle as a citrus-honey glaze for salads or light meats. One jar replaces your honey, fruit jam, and tea concentrate - all at once.
