item_details.Flavor: (307) Taste(209) Aroma(58) Relaxing(29) Honey content(16) Texture(16) Value for money(53) Strength(17) Reviews with images See all photos Top reviews from the United States  Renee 5.0 out of 5 stars  Doesn’t taste very “green” but it is ridiculously delicious Reviewed in the United States on August 27, 2024 Size: 50 Count (Pack of 1)Verified Purchase I’m a lifelong fan of green tea. I drink it 1-2x a day, unsweetened and steeped overlong for the added bitterness. I tend to stick with plain green teas as my go to but decided to treat myself, as I do enjoy honey in herbal and black teas, and the concept of steeping honey flavor versus adding honey was novel enough for me to try. OH MY GOSH THIS TEA SMELLS INCREDIBLE was my very first thought after opening the tin. I seriously huffed it for at least a minute. I set my kettle to 190°F for a first try (green tea typically likes a cooler temp, ~170°, but added herbs and flavors need a little higher temp to steep effectively) and this is the sweet spot for me. I tried 200° but it definitely scalded the green tea and ruined the honey taste. The flavor is divine after a 5 minute brewing time (in a 14oz mug if you need the measurement) - the honey aroma fills the air and the ginseng has a sweet, pungent, floral tone. I honestly barely taste the green tea in this unless I steep it overlong, which is probably perfect if you’re someone who wants to like green tea but just can’t quite get it. The taste is sufficiently sweet if you’re someone who enjoys sweetness in moderation. I thoroughly enjoy this tea and look forward to drinking it every morning. Sometimes I will add a bag to my post-dinner cup of (currently) jasmine and green tea, and the combination of floral tones is intoxicating. What a wonderful tea, and at a humble price. What prompted me to write this review is that I am currently sick and accidentally choked on this tea this morning. It was surprisingly pleasant as it went through my sinuses and I thought, wow, I have to make sure someone else can potentially experience this someday! bullets: Daily Green Tea: A relaxing blend combines the ancient health properties of China green tea with Panax ginseng and full blossom honey. This delicious, subtly sweet tea offers a peaceful sipping experience.

Steeping Instructions: Simply heat fresh, filtered water to just short of boiling. Then pour 6 oz water over tea and steep for 1-3 minutes.
Caffeine: This green tea contains a small amount of caffeine, so it is perfect to add to your daily routine to give you slight energy without the coffee-like jitters.

bullets: AUTHENTIC HONEY JEJU HALLABONG TEA – Made with preserved Jeju hallabong (tangerine) blended with honey for a naturally sweet and refreshing citrus flavor. Enjoy the traditional taste of Korean fruit tea in every sip.
MULTI-USE FRUIT PRESERVE – Perfect as a honey fruit tea, spread on toast, or used as a marmalade base for desserts and snacks. Versatile for both hot and iced drinks.
RICH CITRUS AND HONEY BLEND – Combines hallabong, sugar, and honey to create a unique balance of tangy citrus and smooth sweetness, delivering a satisfying taste experience.
TRADITIONAL KOREAN TEA HERITAGE – Hallabong is a prized citrus fruit from Jeju Island, and this tea continues the long tradition of Korean preserved fruit teas enjoyed for generations.
EASY TO PREPARE – Simply mix 2–3 teaspoons with hot or cold water to create a quick fruit tea. Great for busy mornings or as a refreshing afternoon drink.

important_information.Directions: Add 25g of honey preserve to every 80ml of hot or cold water, stir well, and enjoy!

important_information.Directions: 1. Boil water and let it cool slightly for green tea (recommended temperature: 160°F - 180°F). For black tea, use boiling water (212°F). 2. Remove the tea bag and enjoy the tea. 6. For iced tea, let the tea cool and mix with ice.

bullets: FRESH FLAVOR: Six boxes of 20 Camomile, Honey & Vanilla Herbal tea bags. A soothing herbal tea made with camomile and honey & vanilla flavors. Steep for three to five minutes depending on desired strength for the perfect cup of camomile tea.

ONLY THE FINEST QUALITY: Our expert blenders source only the finest leaves cultivated to our exacting standards by trusted growers around the world. From these tea gardens we hand-select the leaves that will shape your next Twinings moment.
CAMOMILE TEA: A relaxing herbal tea expertly blended using only 100% pure camomile blossoms to deliver a soothing tea with a soft, floral aroma and smooth taste.

RICH HISTORY: In 1706 Thomas Twining began selling fine tea from an English storefront in The Strand, London. Today, Twinings still sells some of the world's best teas from the original store and in more than 100 countries throughout the world.

HAND SELECTED FOR YOUR HOME: Made without artificial ingredients, Twinings natural teas provide a wholesome tea experience. If you enjoy Bigelow Tea, Lipton Tea, Harney & Sons Tea, Davidson's Tea, or Prince of Peace Tea - try Twining's of London Tea.

Perfect for Any Occasion: Ideal for tea parties, cozy evenings, self-care routines, or as a thoughtful gift set. Loved by tea enthusiasts, wellness seekers, and anyone who enjoys relaxing herbal infusions.

Convenient Anytime, Anywhere: Individually wrapped tea bags ensure freshness and make this set easy to use at home, in the office, or while traveling. A must-have for herbal tea collections and daily wellness rituals.

bullets: Hong Kong-style milk tea is a popular tea drink made from Ceylon black tea and milk. It is usually part of Hongkongers' tea culture, typically served as part of afternoon tea but also at breakfast or dinner.

[Product Description] The product is 100% Ceylon Black Tea. It is the best tea to make traditional Hong Kong Style Milk Tea. Hong Kong-style milk tea is a unique drink in Hong Kong. The tea taste is more bitter and astringent, and the taste is smooth and mellow. The tea has a strong flavour and a long-lasting milk fragrance. The entrance is smooth and silky, and it will not rush down in one drink, but stretches fine and honey, with a creamy taste.
[Direction] 1.) Make tea like ordinary black tea, or boil tea in a kettle for a strong flavour. 2.) Filter out the tea particles. 3.) Add sugar and milk to the tea, then serve.

important_information.Directions: 1. Boil water and let it cool slightly for green tea (recommended temperature: 160°F - 180°F). For black tea, use boiling water (212°F). 2. Remove the tea bag and enjoy the tea. 6. For iced tea, let the tea cool and mix with ice.

bullets: Texas-Style Iced Tea In Minutes – Brew authentic HTeaO sweet or unsweetened iced tea in just 5 minutes. Easy to prepare, it’s perfect for making large, family-size servings that bring the refreshing taste of Texas to your home, even when you're not near a store.
Delicious Mint Black Tea - Using a combination of hand-harvested Argentinian black tea and homegrown spearmint from the state of Oregon, HTeaO's Mint Tea has a refreshing, crisp mint taste.

Makes 4 Gallons Of Iced Tea – Each package includes 8 flavored tea bags, with each sachet brewing 0.5 gallon of tea. That’s a total of 4 gallons of ready-to-drink tea, offering great value and easy preparation for holiday parties! Ideal for entertaining, gifting, or keeping the fridge stocked for family get-togethers.

Guilt-Free and Diet-Friendly – Naturally calorie-free and carb-free, this tea is a smart choice for low-carb lifestyles or anyone watching their sugar intake. Made with hand-harvested, non-GMO, gluten-free, and kosher ingredients, it lets you control the sweetness for a refreshing sip every time.

Enjoy Your Favorite Tea At Home – Since 2009, we’ve served over 20 million cups of our delicious iced tea. Now you can enjoy the same premium quality and signature HTeaO flavor at home, so you never have to miss your favorite tea again.

important_information.Safety Information: Contains caffeine. Not recommended for children or pregnant women. Ingredients Black Tea Leaves. Spearmint Leaf
important_information.Directions: To make 0.5 gallon (2 quarts) of iced tea: 1. Boil 2 quarts of water. 2. Place 1 sachet in a pitcher. 3. Pour the boiling water over the sachet. 4. Let it steep for 5 minutes. 5. Remove the sachet and add ice to fill the pitcher. 6. Serve over ice. For a stronger flavor, let the tea steep for up to 10 minutes.

bullets: WATERMELON MINT BLACK ICED TEA: Eight large, unbleached tea pouches are perfectly portioned for making it easy to steep healthy, premium iced tea at home.

FRESH MINT & MELON FLAVOR NOTES: This iced tea captures the essence of summer with the natural, fresh sweetness of sun-ripened watermelon finished with a touch of cool peppermint. A smooth base of fine black tea rounds out this bold, bright, refresher.

STEEPING INSTRUCTIONS: Place one pouch with 2 cups of boiling water in a heat-safe pitcher. Steep for 3-5 minutes. Remove pouch then stir in one heaping cup of ice until ice melts. Add one more cup of cold water and serve over more ice. After steeping, add the used pouches to compost or soil — they make gardens happy.
BLACK ICED TEA: Quench your thirst with a naturally caffeinated tea that is perfect to accompany you on a warm day.
GLUTEN FREE: This tea is gluten-free, so you can sip away without worry.

bullets: Texas-Style Iced Tea In Minutes – Brew authentic HTeaO sweet or unsweetened iced tea in just 5 minutes. Easy to prepare, it’s perfect for making large, family-size servings that bring the refreshing taste of Texas to your home, even when you're not near a store.
Delicious Mint Black Tea - Using a combination of hand-harvested Argentinian black tea and homegrown spearmint from the state of Oregon, HTeaO's Mint Tea has a refreshing, crisp mint taste.

Makes 8 Gallons Of Iced Tea – Each package includes 16 flavored tea bags, with each sachet brewing 0.5 gallon of tea. That’s a total of 8 gallons of ready-to-drink tea, offering great value and easy preparation for parties or gatherings.

Guilt-Free and Diet-Friendly – Naturally calorie-free and carb-free, this tea is a smart choice for low-carb lifestyles or anyone watching their sugar intake. Made with hand-harvested, non-GMO, gluten-free, and kosher ingredients, it lets you control the sweetness for a refreshing sip every time.

Enjoy Your Favorite Tea At Home – Since 2009, we’ve served over 20 million cups of our delicious iced tea. Now you can enjoy the same premium quality and signature HTeaO flavor at home, so you never have to miss your favorite tea again.

Helpful Report  Byte 4.0 out of 5 stars  Product is GREAT but quality inspection for how it's packaged is lacking Reviewed in the United States on February 1, 2024 Verified Purchase I've purchased this a few times now and, while I'll continue to purchase this product because I love it, I will warn future buyers on how the product sometimes arrives damaged. Twice in a row several packages INSIDE the individual boxes sometimes arrive damaged and unsealed. The contents spill inside the box and leak outside into the larger container. I guess these aren't stored in a 100% dry environment as there's a very slight 'sticky' residue on the boxes with the damaged product, perhaps where it came into contact with humidity or moisture in the air? Product is still good, though. I'd just throw out damaged products or the entire individual box it came in (depending on the damage) so it slightly decreases it's value. To rate the product without it's faults, it's really good. My favorite is the peach ice tea, but I also really like the pomegranate, and the raspberry black tea! Watch out for the caffeine though, if you're sensitive. I'm not sure how much they contain, but they do come with caffeine (makes sense, seeing as some of them are made with black tea). bullets: Premium Instant Tea: Made from 100% green tea leaves, Waka Instant Green Tea is a fine powder that dissolves easily in any liquid, providing a smooth and authentic tea experience without any sugar, additives, fillers, or artificial ingredients.

Delicious Peach Flavor: Enjoy the subtle notes of fresh and juicy peaches in a green tea that is perfect on its own, both hot and iced, or enhanced with milk and sugar. Whether you're starting the day or having a break, Waka delivers a bold and refreshing flavor to keep you going.

Affordable Tea Mix: Packaged with love in California, Waka brings you a convenient, affordable, and high-quality tea experience you can enjoy at home - no steeping or brewing necessary. Each pouch of tea creates up to 200 drinks with approx. 35mg of caffeine per serving.

Multi-Use Powder: At Waka, we know instant beverages the best, because it is all we do. Be your own barista at home and instantly make your beverage hot, iced, loaded, or whipped - however you like it. Designed for a variety of recipes, delight in the ease and quickness of a tea made with only 3 steps - pour, mix, and enjoy.

Waka Cares: Our pouches are made with post-consumer recycled content, and their compact design helps reduce our carbon footprint. Recognizing that processing coffee requires a significant amount of water, we donate to support clean water initiatives in developing countries throughout Africa, Asia, and South America.

bullets: SMOOTH PEACHY TASTE: Brimming with notes of ripe peach, this Lipton Peach Green Tea flavor with other natural flavor blend is equally delicious and refreshing

2 CUPS TO GOODNESS: Per serving, unsweetened Lipton Peach Green Tea contains about 75mg of Flavonoids, naturally occurring bioactives found in tea, vegetables, and fruit. Enjoy two cups a day to provide 150mg of Flavonoids

EASY TO MAKE, HOT OR ICED: For hot green tea, pour 8 fl oz of hot water (212°F) over a tea bag, infuse for 4 minutes, remove, and enjoy; For iced green tea, add 16 fl oz of hot water (212°F) over 4 tea bags in a pitcher, infuse for 4 minutes, remove, and sip away
CHANGE UP YOUR WELLNESS ROUTINE: Each serving of Lipton Peach Green Tea contains about 75mg of Flavonoids, 0 calories, 0g of added sugars, and is 99.5% water
RESPONSIBLY SOURCED: Lipton green tea is Rainforest Alliance Certified because we believe in a world where people and nature thrive together; Learn more at ra.org
